# Thread: 6 yrs old super healthy kid out of blue had open appendoctomy and dealing abscesses
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/6-yrs-old-super-healthy-kid-out-of-blue-had-open-appendoctomy-and-dealing-abscesses.20631/>

### raw — 2018-01-01T20:06:32+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/6-yrs-old-super-healthy-kid-out-of-blue-had-open-appendoctomy-and-dealing-abscesses.20631/post-231383>

I had a nightmare when my healthy 6 yrs old daughter went through a horrible life and death situation when she was rushed in to a local hospital. Ct scans, huge surgery and months on antibiotic save her life for a moment but trashed her health away. She is super athletic, creative, healthy and bright little girl who always uses her blueblockers, eat an epi paleo diet, expose herself in cold and values the out doors and spending the unlimited time under the sun. Her surgery took place in a local hospital on Nov 17, 2017 . She came home with antibiotics for 14 days. Unfortunately after 13 days of antibiotics, we rushed into the hospital again when she felt the horrible pain on her left side. After another CT scan and ultrasounds again the obscesses were visible and again she came home with another 14 days of antibiotics. This second time she improved rapidly and was able to stand up straight. But the day we stopped her antibiotics (after 14 days), she showed a little pain again in her left side. We marked her pain when she stopped standing straight again. Then we made a trip to sunny Fl for 4 days and end of the trip, she started to feel perfect again and her standing got straight again. But now we are back in NYC and on the way our car journey, she told me that she had very little pain and she started to stand again the faulty way. We got an appointment to the hospital in one month, but what should we do for now? How we will know that our daughter is risk free? Probably these conventional treatment just giving me the guarantee to save her life for the emergency situation, but it is not solving her problem. I am looking desperate help from Dr Jack Kruse at this moment for peace of my mind. Thank you all

I would recommend a stool culture to see what is going on with her gut flora - N.Y. just got 5G so it is possible that is what did you in - get or rent a wifi meter - obviously you need to get your daughter somewhere else for awhile but foods containing probiotics would be great here along with prebiotics - you probably know all this - you can use ubiome or americangut to sequence her gut flora - maybe she picked something up - it could be a virus - maybe she just started school and picked something up - viruses grow like weeds in the wifi - I actually know someone who lives in a wifi hot spot whose daughter had scarlet fever if you can believe that... this stuff is no joke - also, you might want to get in someone who can meter your house for you - she could be too close to some electrical field - your neighbor might have gotten new tech toys for Christmas - we must measure our environment -

I agree with you Inger. I am one of those people who r on RPD for a long time. Before my daughter was born. She was born as a strongest baby cause in her time before 2011, I used to do nude sunbathing regularly and used to eat high protein and fat food. As a result, my daughter was born normal (normal delivery) where I had a very complicated pregnancy when my son was born. In my second pregnancy, I did not even bother to see a physician.

After long hospitalization and month of antibiotics, her tolerances of cold decrease. It is freezing cold here. She is not the same girl right now. She's lost most of her muscle mess and just skinny bone right now. She bet 20 yrs old athlete in marathon and having 300 push up in one time . She thrives on sea food , high quality of fats, and everything that has the highest food values....

Recently we went to Florida and we picked up some local huge (largest size) passion fruits . She consumes one (like 10 Tsp) by herself a passion fruit. If I talk about fruits, you can imagine a little girl crazy about passion fruits, cranberry, amla berry etc....She loves tropical fruits too but at the same time she rejects to have a banana to eat here in NYC. She is an educated little girl.

I know how she got into trouble but I am scared to rethink about that. I made mistake and now I need to look forward how to fix her again. The biggest mistake here is, I took time to take her to the hospital. If I could take her right away, then she would come out fast from emergency . I am burning in hell day and night seeing my daughter's innocent face and do not know what to do at this moment. She is doing good so far. I mean she has a great appetite, normal bowl movement, regular whole body massage everyday, taking some probiotics, eating high fat food . The change I made in her diet is that I am cooking lightly everything instead giving her raw food. I even cook with Mountain valley spring water ....She is doing great so far. But lost her all muscle mass. Should I avoid that ultrasound on March 1st? Please, forgive me for my clumsy writing...I m little restless and trying my best to explain here . Thank you my friend. I never forget you and your invitation that you asked me to come to your place 6 years back. I am a big fan of your journal ''Inger healing journey'' on RPD forum

From what I know today,
I have given you the question to Jack that I would ask.

Hopefully others chime in with more.
But even if that is the only question that you initially have,
I am sure Jack will give you good suggestions (hopefully using 2nd grade language) (rather than QM).
Consultation do not have to last long to be valuable.
Often one breadcrumb can make a big or all the difference.
..

> [raw said:](/goto/post?id=231621)

> I agree with you Inger. I am one of those people who r on RPD for a long time. Before my daughter was born. She was born as a strongest baby cause in her time before 2011, I used to do nude sunbathing regularly and used to eat high protein and fat food. As a result, my daughter was born normal (normal delivery) where I had a very complicated pregnancy when my son was born. In my second pregnancy, I did not even bother to see a physician.
>
> After long hospitalization and month of antibiotics, her tolerances of cold decrease. It is freezing cold here. She is not the same girl right now. She's lost most of her muscle mess and just skinny bone right now. She bet 20 yrs old athlete in marathon and having 300 push up in one time . She thrives on sea food , high quality of fats, and everything that has the highest food values....
>
> Recently we went to Florida and we picked up some local huge (largest size) passion fruits . She consumes one (like 10 Tsp) by herself a passion fruit. If I talk about fruits, you can imagine a little girl crazy about passion fruits, cranberry, amla berry etc....She loves tropical fruits too but at the same time she rejects to have a banana to eat here in NYC. She is an educated little girl.
>
> I know how she got into trouble but I am scared to rethink about that. I made mistake and now I need to look forward how to fix her again. The biggest mistake here is, I took time to take her to the hospital. If I could take her right away, then she would come out fast from emergency . I am burning in hell day and night seeing my daughter's innocent face and do not know what to do at this moment. She is doing good so far. I mean she has a great appetite, normal bowl movement, regular whole body massage everyday, taking some probiotics, eating high fat food . The change I made in her diet is that I am cooking lightly everything instead giving her raw food. I even cook with Mountain valley spring water ....She is doing great so far. But lost her all muscle mass. Should I avoid that ultrasound on March 1st? Please, forgive me for my clumsy writing...I m little restless and trying my best to explain here . Thank you my friend. I never forget you and your invitation that you asked me to come to your place 6 years back. I am a big fan of your journal ''Inger healing journey'' on RPD forum

Chaya  do not beat yourself up from past mistakes! We all do them! It is good that you see what you could have done differently, that is how we learn, but you cant go back to the past and feeling guilty or beating one self up is not helping, to the contrary! Just live in the now and try to listen to your deepest intelligence what is the best thing to do, it will know, just be in the present.
Do you have a meter to measure nnEMF where you live? (Unfortunately nnEMF / RF meters cant detect 5 G  so you have to check on a map for towers, and check their frequency, to know. 5 G is a very high frequency) That would be great, then you could check what places are the best healing places for your kid.. and if she could do grounding a lot, that would help the healing! If it is winter, it is hard tho... You really should need to go to Mexico to a cenote! That would be the ultimate healing......eating seafood, drinking deuterium depleted water.. getting sun and grounding...
If you feel that lightly cooked animal food is right now, it is probably the way to go. I am not a 100% raw fan as I see benefits from both - raw and cooked. I think it depends on so many things...unknown to me! Maybe you can give her some high meat/high heart to heal the gut again after the antibiotics? I sure think sugar is a no go now. Everything that helps inflammation would be the way to go...

For DDW you could order Icelandic glacial water online, some shops carry it too. This is always a good option I guess, since it is naturally deuterium depleted so it is no risk to get too low.. But chances are that if you have lots of nnEMF around, like 5 G and such, your daugther still have accumulated way too much deuterium, especially if she has been eating fruit. Radiation makes our bodies to hold on to the deuterium, you know. It just cant deplete it as it would do in a natural environment. And an all animal food diet, including lots of seafood, is the most deuterium depleted diet

Take care

### Penny — 2018-01-05T21:50:01+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/6-yrs-old-super-healthy-kid-out-of-blue-had-open-appendoctomy-and-dealing-abscesses.20631/post-231719>

Yeah, Lugol's would be great along with selenium, but I would start with grass fed bone broth and stick some saurkraut juice in it while it's not too hot so it won't kill the probiotics in the sauerkraut - I have had amazing luck with just taking a couple tablespoons of Great Lakes gelatin and stirring it up in some sugar free cranberry juice - it helps your mitochondria as well as your gut lining - for a kid, just stick it in a milkshake with blueberries and yogurt - preferably a home made one like a GAPS diet yogurt that's been fermented for 24 hours - almonds are the best prebiotics along with shrimp shells - good luck getting a kid to eat shrimp shells - I've had great luck with chitosan but it probably has some deuterium in it - you also might try the berberines (Oregon Grape root) and give your child lots of garlic - you can stick a lot of healthy herbs in curries - turmeric, cumin, cinnomon, coconut cream - not exactly seasonal but it might help - what do they say the absesses are from?

Today after initial check up, her surgeon advised me to have an ultrasound in 2 months to see what's going on inside of her. The fact is that JUST for my kids, I quit my cell phone 5 yrs back. I limited their TV times, and other things that are necessary to do. These kids used to be in beach even in winter. We are cold water swimmers but from this year for her condition we gave up our cold swimming. After months long antibiotics and no sun, we are unsure to take her again in cold ocean this moment. Raw, I know that you are a wonderful Mother to your children and a beautiful person overall and both, for yourself and your children, please don't beat yourself up over what has happened. Instead, use your energy in a constructive way and look forward to your daughter's road to healing/recovery now. I also remember your concerns over your husband's irresponsible use of technology and that is something that you will have to talk with him about. This is a good time to put your foot down with him because he needs to understand how this is effecting your daughter, son, you and him as well. I had to do the same thing with my husband too. You can do it sweetie, I know you can!

You can message me if you need to.

Ct scans, huge surgery and months on antibiotic save her life for a moment but trashed her health away. She is super athletic, creative, healthy and bright little girl who always uses her blueblockers, eat an epi paleo diet, expose herself in cold and values the out doors and spending the unlimited time under the sun. Her surgery took place in a local hospital on Nov 17, 2017 . She came home with antibiotics for 14 days. Unfortunately after 13 days of antibiotics, we rushed into the hospital again when she felt the horrible pain on her left side. After another CT scan and ultrasounds again the obscesses were visible and again she came home with another 14 days of antibiotics. This second time she improved rapidly and was able to stand up straight. But the day we stopped her antibiotics (after 14 days), she showed a little pain again in her left side. We marked her pain when she stopped standing straight again. Then we made a trip to sunny Fl for 4 days and end of the trip, she started to feel perfect again and her standing got straight again. But now we are back in NYC and on the way our car journey, she told me that she had very little pain and she started to stand again the faulty way. # Thread: why is remembering dreams a sign you are improving?
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/why-is-remembering-dreams-a-sign-you-are-improving.20633/>
**Subforum:** Beginners Area
**Posts:** 8
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### taiyang — 2018-01-02T12:35:28+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/why-is-remembering-dreams-a-sign-you-are-improving.20633/post-231410>

last night i remembered two or more dreams. i have heard here that is a good sign, but why? couldn't it also be a sign my sleep was more disturbed because i woke up after the period of sleep where dreams occur? i felt really refreshed when i woke up, though. plus, when i really did have disturbed sleep from headaches and feeling too hot or cold, or just plain insomnia, i usually didn't remember my dreams. however, i always thought that if you don't remember dreams, it's not that you don't have them, you just slept through the phase where you could have remembered them. i also remember that taking 5 htp as a substrate for serotonin production (i take no 5 htp or melatonin now) would sometimes make me have wild, happy dreams which always left me waking up in a good mood. 5 htp and melatonin would never work consistently for me. but for a while, they kept me from being so sleep deprived i would have to concentrate extra hard when driving.

### Lahelada — 2018-01-02T14:18:38+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/why-is-remembering-dreams-a-sign-you-are-improving.20633/post-231414>

Short answer would be that they are a sign of an improved DC circuit, the signal changing direction as it should during sleep and new neural networks being created or pruned back.
Have a look here . [https://www.jackkruse.com/energy-epigenetics-9-quantum-sleep/](https://www.jackkruse.com/energy-epigenetics-9-quantum-sleep/)
"_Guess what dreams really are?_ They are the “firing up” of these newly made neural networks, so they become operational using light."

This may be a good podcast to listen to as well.
[http://ascendbodymind.com/bp1/2015/9/19/bp3-dr-jack-kruse](http://ascendbodymind.com/bp1/2015/9/19/bp3-dr-jack-kruse)

### Inger — 2018-01-02T14:42:52+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/why-is-remembering-dreams-a-sign-you-are-improving.20633/post-231415>

I just learned today that we clear deuterium from our tissues during sleep, and to be detailed, during REM sleep it is!
REM sleep is the rapid eye movement sleep phase and the time when we dream and have also lucid dreams.

So my guess is, when you start to have those clear amazing dreams it is a sign that your REM sleep is improving, or you start to have longer REM sleep phases and more often, which is a really good thing

I dream so much and often have very real dreams that I can clearly remember after I wake up... also I often have multiple dreams/night..... it is a nice thing for sure   like entering a totally different world in the night..lol
Often my dreams are very amazing too, like making me really happy

Probably it is a real health sign that your body is able to get rid of deuterium

This is a very non geek answer tho, as I am so not a geek but this I do get and it makes so much sense! That you feel so good after a night with lots of vivid dreams is a sign too  Of course one feels better after having cleared out excess deuterium

### Inger — 2018-01-02T14:47:25+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/why-is-remembering-dreams-a-sign-you-are-improving.20633/post-231416>

Drinking this glacial water and being on this deuterium depleting biohack might have made my sleep further improve as I have had such an amazing sleep lately! Of course, the dreaming is there, and also when I wake up I feel like soooo heavy relaxed it is magic  Like I would have taken some drugs but I have not..lol very nice

I did have some shitty sleep this fall.. might have been stress related as my fiance left me and I was just so heart broken. But I just go on and deuterium deplete and do the good stuff, and now I feel so much better!

### Da-mo — 2018-01-03T00:16:48+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/why-is-remembering-dreams-a-sign-you-are-improving.20633/post-231452>

I had the same experience last night - remembering dreams.

The last 2 day I have been reading on deuterium depletion. Got lots of morning sun and added slices of lemon to my water and ice to help deuterium deplete. Have also been eating mainly keto the last few days (less D in fat).

I have also noticed that whereas sometimes I wake and ruminate on stressful things, lately I have been far more relaxed before leaving the bed.

### taiyang — 2018-01-03T11:19:06+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/why-is-remembering-dreams-a-sign-you-are-improving.20633/post-231466>

yesterday got 25 minutes of morning sun. along with a seafood breakfast. and water. then a crap day of eating cookies for lunch and a late dinner. on top of that i watched a scompy podcast of nnemf in the schools. i woke up at 2 am and was not able to sleep. still had great blood sugar waking up. even with the window cracked open here in chilly new jersey, i wasn't cozy because someone in my house turned the thermostat to 70. i put a post it note under it saying that i need 65 to 68 or i won't sleep. note to self- if in a rush at work, better to fast than eat delicious marshmallow covered m and m's and cookies because nothing tastes as good as a good sleep feels. today is going to be rough. a good point to focus on- we are required to use online learning tools daily with the elementary school students. previously i had been setting them up with laptops everyday. yesterday was the first day i put them on the wired computers. that's what i'm doing from now on.

### Jack Kruse — 2022-06-08T16:38:57+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/why-is-remembering-dreams-a-sign-you-are-improving.20633/post-313446>

# Thread: Health Journal 2018 of Lyme Disease to Restoration
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/health-journal-2018-of-lyme-disease-to-restoration.20635/>
**Subforum:** My Optimal Journal
**Posts:** 133
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### Annemarie Heise — 2018-01-02T22:11:54+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/health-journal-2018-of-lyme-disease-to-restoration.20635/post-231440>

Here I sit and in Wisconsin on a sunless day with minus 4 degrees developing a strategy to get my life back.
The information in front of me is daunting, yet I am commited to capture it one crumb at a time.

I was Diagnosed 2 years ago via [www.igenex.com](http://www.igenex.com) as positive for Lyme Disease. The diagnosis was not easy to acquire as it required 80 responses, that there is nothing wrong with me and in the end perhaps pysch counseling is necessary. I tried many treatments without success until I found [www.bxprotocol.com](http://www.bxprotocol.com) and learned about mitachondrial dysfunction. I started the program in September of 2017 and have made progress
including getting rid of the terrible vertigo that I had suffered with for 1.5 years. I clicked onto a webinar with Dr. Pompao and Jack Kruse in November of 2017 and was mesmerized. I started reading and learning and now I am ready to implement change.
My current symptoms: scale from 1-10 10 being the worst
Stiff neck 10
Neck Spasms 4
Left Shoulder stiffness 10
Right shoulder stiffness 7
Spine Stiffness 10
Spine Spasms 4
Left hip stiffness 10
Right hip stiffness 7
Knee stiffness 4
Sensitivity to Light 10
Sensitivity to Sound 10
Bilateral Tinnitus 10
Energy 5
Dry Skin 5
Hair Loss 5
Tension 1
Eyes Burning 1
Eyes Watering 1
Hearing Issues 5
Visual Disturbances 8

These symptoms have resulting in me being chairbound and not being able to care for myself. I have a loving support husband and family. They would do anything...I am grateful.

I sleep well uninterupted 7-9 hours. I eliminate well 2 x's daily. I thought I had good digestion until I found out I was not absorbing well. I complete distilled water enemas 2-3 x a week recommended by BX.

Current Diet: Sugar Free, Dairy Free, mostly plant based and whole grains. Drinking 60 oz distilled water as recommended by BX.

I am on Bioidentical hormones via pellets. I take 5mg Amlodopine for Blood Pressure as the tight musles were increasing the pressure some. I am running regularly 116/74 and am considering cutting dose in half.

I take thyroid Rx Levo 75mg, Nature Throid 65mg

I take a few supplements.. Magnesium 400m Omega 3 fish oil 2000, Bergamot BPF, S.O. D. from BX, COQ10

NEW- I am turning off my router at night! and hired a person to come and do an assessment of our home.

Radon assessment and Mold assessment have been completed and are all good.

RECENTLY: I Read the book...THE 5th dimension of health and purchased a [www.imrs.com](http://www.imrs.com) and am on the mat 3 times a week.

[http://www.ozonegenerator.com/oxygen\_concentrators/oxygen\_concentrators.php](http://www.ozonegenerator.com/oxygen_concentrators/oxygen_concentrators.php)
I purchased an EWOT machine through :
The purchase is exercise with Oxygen and BX has found it a game changer in client health.

I purchased an infared sauna and am still figuring out how to incorporate it into my home therapy.

I did all the tests as listed on [www.Cignaturehealth.com](http://www.Cignaturehealth.com) Results back in 3-4 weeks
I am drinking 50 oz daily of non carbonated Deuterium Depleted Water 85 ppm shipped direct from Cignature health 4 month supply
Info from Dr. Cooper at Cignature health:

In addition to consuming deuterium depleted water (DDW), there are several other methods that can also be used to help deplete deuterium in your body including a natural paleo-keto diet and increasing the oxygen in your tissues. A natural paleo-keto diet is comprised of nature's low deuterium foods - grass fed meats, wild fish, green plants and other foods we can share with you from our database. In fact, contrary to what you may have been taught, fat from plants, grass fed animals and wild fish should be an important part of your diet. Our body makes its own deuterium depleted water every time it uses fat to make the energy it needs to get through the day. So if you're always thirsty then it may be because you're simply not eating enough fat.

Oxygen, on the other hand, binds with hydrogen to make water (H2O). However, oxygen happens to prefer binding to deuterium (heavy hydrogen) over regular sized hydrogen, and it also holds onto to it very tightly once it binds. This allows oxygen to help deplete the deuterium in your tissue by turning it into water and dumping it to your biological fluids like urine and saliva. Decreased tissue oxygen is seen in a variety of metabolic disorders including asthma, diabetes, cancer, Alzheimer's, autoimmunity and IBS. Increasing the oxygen in your tissue has been shown to result in much better clinical outcomes and quality of life with such disorders. Our Healthy Breath Deuterium Depleting Mask helps increase the oxygen in your tissues. If you haven't purchased one then we suggest that you do. And if you did then you'll find an easy-to-follow guidebook attached.

In fact, contrary to what you may have been taught, fat from plants, grass fed animals and wild fish should be an important part of your diet. Our body makes its own deuterium depleted water every time it uses fat to make the energy it needs to get through the day. So if you're always thirsty then it may be because you're simply not eating enough fat.
>
> Oxygen, on the other hand, binds with hydrogen to make water (H2O). However, oxygen happens to prefer binding to deuterium (heavy hydrogen) over regular sized hydrogen, and it also holds onto to it very tightly once it binds. This allows oxygen to help deplete the deuterium in your tissue by turning it into water and dumping it to your biological fluids like urine and saliva. Decreased tissue oxygen is seen in a variety of metabolic disorders including asthma, diabetes, cancer, Alzheimer's, autoimmunity and IBS. Increasing the oxygen in your tissue has been shown to result in much better clinical outcomes and quality of life with such disorders. Our Healthy Breath Deuterium Depleting Mask helps increase the oxygen in your tissues. If you haven't purchased one then we suggest that you do. And if you did then you'll find an easy-to-follow guidebook attached.

Have you got:

or
you will drink any other fluids?

I still prefer MB as it is an electron donor as well . WIKI:"(an artificial electron acceptor (such as methylene blue or flavin) for NADPH [methemoglobin reductase](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Methemoglobin_reductase) (RBCs usually don't have one; the presence of methylene blue allows the enzyme to function at 5× normal levels[\[ \[URL='https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/PubMed\_Identifier'\]PMID](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Methemoglobinemia#cite_note-10)[7400118](https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pubmed/7400118)\]\[/URL\]). The NADPH is generated via the [hexose monophosphate shunt](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Hexose_monophosphate_shunt). )"

> I am simply going to redo Dutch test soon as it is apparent I don;t have all the data. Do you use darkening shades or blinds? Or do you wake up naturally to the rising sun? Please advise

I sleep in (TOTALLY) dark bedroom.
I go to bathroom at night using handheld red light.
There I squat standing on Squatty Potty.
When I get up 6AM I turn switch on.
Lots of variety of light goes on, from UV until heater.
I am mostly naked indoor and on my backyard.
Highly lit day (14hrs long) ends at about 8PM.
Only red and heater are from 8PM till 10PM
10PM - 6PM is my night time

All this highly lit indoor is still not as bright as the outdoors on sunny day.

My glasses barely get darker when illuminated by Sperti,
but get totally dark even of cloudy day.

Long way to say that sunlight is always much more powerful.

For my lights see:
[https://forum.jackkruse.com/index.php?threads/pg-e2-ratio.6427/page-4#post-201738](https://forum.jackkruse.com/index.php?threads/pg-e2-ratio.6427/page-4#post-201738)

750W x2 heater is not included there. ( I am hoping that it have 1538.5nm (IR-B))

### Jack Kruse — 2018-04-22T16:33:38+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/health-journal-2018-of-lyme-disease-to-restoration.20635/post-239677>

Curiosity like common sense does not grow in everyone's garden — a state of active interest or genuinely wanting to know more about something — allows you to embrace unfamiliar circumstances, giving you a greater opportunity to experience discovery and joy. We all want to be happy; according to the Dalai Lama, it is "the very purpose of our life."

Yet despite the incredible advancement of modern-day technology and society, few of us are happy. If ignorance is truly bliss why aren't more people happy? A 2013 Harris Poll found that only one in three Americans say they're very happy. Happiness is linked to the amount and quality of sunlight we get and the people we spend our time with.

Perhaps this is because the majority of our time is spent in unsatisfying work, repetitive daily routines, associating with the wrong people, and at night passively watching a blue-lit flickering screen??

But we don't have to settle for unhappy lives. We're all capable of achieving happiness and more meaning in life if we adopt the right attitudes and behaviors and people we spend time with. Perhaps the most important attitude linked to happiness is curiosity. It helps us avoid bullshit beliefs of other people peddle in life.

# Thread: Burglar Alarm PIR... New risk...
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/burglar-alarm-pir-new-risk.20637/>
**Subforum:** The EMF Rx
**Posts:** 19
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### Jamie Ward — 2018-01-03T15:41:31+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/burglar-alarm-pir-new-risk.20637/post-231487>

Our WIRED burglar system had to be re-instated and initially, the firm tried to replace all the wired PIRs with wireless. Obviously, we advised against this and they replaced with wired PIRs as we are trying to avoid microwave radiation.

Anyway, I was having a conversation with someone about burglar alarms and they were told they can opt for infrared PIRs and Microwave PIR at about 10GHz. I grew suspicious of the PIRs in our house and ordered a meter that stretches to 10GHz.

Low and behold they are giving off extremely powerful microwaves, 20mW/M^2 before at a foot before it hits the upper limit of the Gigahertz Solutions HFW 59D.

This emphasizes the need to meter and to look for as a wide band as possible. I also found some other emitting device left my previous owners in the attic when I got this meter.

Trust nothing, test everything.

### Da-mo — 2018-01-03T16:44:10+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/burglar-alarm-pir-new-risk.20637/post-231502>

Please define PIR etc. We have a burglar alarm installed that we never use and that has 2 motion detectors in the house. Wondering if this could be the final piece of the EMF puzzle in our home . . . . . except for maybe the electric fence unit installed in the attached garage . . . . .

[https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Passive\_infrared\_sensor](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Passive_infrared_sensor)
They are easily identified by that opaque plastic fresnel lens in front of the sensor.

### JanSz — 2018-01-03T19:11:25+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/burglar-alarm-pir-new-risk.20637/post-231521>

> [drezy said:](/goto/post?id=231512)
>
> [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Passive\_infrared\_sensor](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Passive_infrared_sensor)
> They are easily identified by that opaque plastic fresnel lens in front of the sensor.

From Wiki description it sounds benign, is it?

A **passive infrared sensor** (**PIR sensor**) is an electronic [sensor](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Sensor) that **measures [infrared](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Infrared) (IR) light** radiating from objects in its field of view. They are most often used in PIR-based motion detectors.

..........

### drezy — 2018-01-03T19:19:00+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/burglar-alarm-pir-new-risk.20637/post-231523>

> [JanSz said:](/goto/post?id=231521)
>
> From Wiki description it sounds benign, is it?
>
> A **passive infrared sensor** (**PIR sensor**) is an electronic [sensor](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Sensor) that **measures [infrared](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Infrared) (IR) light** radiating from objects in its field of view. They are most often used in PIR-based motion detectors.
>
> ..........

It's the fact that wires are considered so uncool these days. The mentioned PIR was wireless. I'm not sure if Mr Ward is saying that even the "wired" units were still belching out 10GHz. I hope not, but wouldn't be too surprised either. It's often cheaper to design one unit that can handle both wired and wireless at product design time. Either way I'm glad he measured.

Once the technology gets cheap enough children diapers will have wireless transmitters

[They already exist](https://www.huffingtonpost.com/2014/02/12/smart-diaper-wireless-sensor-alert-baby_n_4768837.html). Watch them become mainstream and even a social shame factor set in if your child stays wet minutes without you immediately knowing.

### Jamie Ward — 2018-01-04T11:05:56+0200

Yes even the WIRED are belching out 10GHz.

Sorry, a PIR is our term for a motion sensor, although it's now apparently outdated as they have moved to dual tech with IR + Microwave. Supposedly to stop false alarms.

I'm fuming and it's going to be an interesting phone call. Unbelievable these are being stuck people's homes.

### Jamie Ward — 2018-01-17T13:32:54+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/burglar-alarm-pir-new-risk.20637/post-232717>

> [Neil Taylor said:](/goto/post?id=232340)
>
> I'm in a rented apartment and have turned off the alarm system at the fuse box. Hoping this will kill the sensors as well.
>
> @[Jamie Ward](https://forum.jackkruse.com/members/18629/) do you know if in the UK then we turn off the electric at the fuse box that this kills all the electricity in the wires.
> I know Jack recommends a breaker switch - I'm checking if this is the same thing in the UK.

Depends... some alarm systems have back up power in case of a power cut...

Also, two things to be aware of:

1) stray current/voltage: even if that particular circuit is off, but a circuit next to it is on and it is close enough, then the current can jump across in unshielded cabling
2) there is voltage even when something isn't plugged in: When something is plugged in and drawing energy you get current/amps, which results in magnetic fields. If it is off and the circuit is closed, voltage travels through still, resulting in electric fields. So you want to ensure the circuit breaker is fully working and killing the voltage to that circuit.

If you have any rise in magnetic field when you are drawing current then there is a wiring error in the house. Correct wiring will not cause a rise in magntic fields. Things to look out for:

1) current on the earth/ground circuits
2) touching of neutral to earth/ground
3) Each circuit should have its own dedicated neutral
4) Avoid neutral to neutral wiring errors
5) Any nicks in the sheating

A big source of these errors are the fuse board where electricians separate the live/hot away from the neutral too far... the bigger the distance, then the higher the magnetic field.

### Lahelada — 2018-01-04T04:47:30+0200

These might be good starter videos. Do not trust what your "likes "" tell you . You do not need to start with cold showers .But you need to get cold dark and boring. Cold you can do with face dunks. Have a look at the cold thermogenesis protocol. Dark = no blue light after sundown, a bedroom taht is completely dark. Yur lighting level at night should ideally be no more than a candle . You should not use any screens after nightfall. All screens should have a blue light filter. IRIS is better than f lux.

This is a very short summary but read ,read and read. print to be able to read a lot. Read everything even if it has nothing to do with histamines. Everything has to do with everything. See the sunrise in teh morning even though there is no visibly "warm " sun. I repeat it is not about your ideas or your comfort. nature is as is. What you consider a "like" is just a random expression of neurotransmitters you are not a slave to. Read,ask questions.You might get more reading as an asnwer. Do not resent that. ### Sue-UK — 2018-01-04T12:26:55+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/leaky-gut-and-histamine-issues.20641/post-231562>

> [sam2018 said:](/goto/post?id=231542)
>
> Hi
>
> We dont get any sun in the UK anymore, so what can I do to help myself?

Hi Sam
I'm in the UK too, and with the lack of good sunshine optimising my sleep is a top priority. No food or screens after sunset, dim lighting and eye protection, and - because sleep is when we regenerate, cold dark and boring bedroom. Although its not just about quantity of sleep, but about quality, at this time of year I aim for a minimum of 5 nights a week with at least 10 hours total darkness, with no wifi interference from anything I have control over. I use blackout curtains but a cheap start off if you don't have them is to use black wheelie bin liners stuck up with blue tack (I take liners and blue tack with me when I travel). I wake up naturally before the sunrise now, (but if I didn't I would set an alarm), I get out at sunrise and get my bare feet on the ground and (no glasses or contacts) look in the direction of the rising sun. Even if I can't see the sun, there is enough photons of light from the sunrise to set the circadian rhythm in my brain. The brain circadian rhythm is like a conductor in an orchestra - it needs to be working right in order for the organ "instruments" to play on time. Any "instrument" can be out of tune or its own circadian "clocks" out of rhythm, so we might all have different issues, but I think getting the conductor in control of the whole orchestra is the same for everyone. For me it didn't happen immediately, but when I understood the importance of it, it was easier being consistent, and it has paid dividends.

Welcome to the forum.

### Sue-UK — 2018-01-05T12:02:34+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/leaky-gut-and-histamine-issues.20641/post-231660>

> [sam2018 said:](/goto/post?id=231613)
>
> Thank you for your replies everyone. I will watch the vids in abit later (if im allowed lol, its gone past sunset here).
>
> So basically im not allowed to eat food after sunset? what if you are hungry? i usually eat at 7-8pm in the uk, sunset is at 4pm
> I have got darkish curtains.
> dim lighting - can i get a low watt bulb maybe 20 watts or something? i dont get on with chemical smells from candles
> wifi - i can try n minimise that - anyone tried the Qlink pendant for EMF protection? Im thinking of doing a kineolosgy energy test when i have enough money, one wth holding a pendant and another without to see of there are any energy changes in my body.
> I do wake up before sunrise most days
> Sunrise - this might be a silly question can i look outside the window at sunrise or DO I HAVE TO BE OUTSIDE AT SUNRISE TIME, ITS VERY COLD ATM? i dont mind walking on the ground barefoot should i do it in soil i could dig up a patch of grass or a walking on a slab is ok?
> If i buy the blue glasses - do i watch tv with them or go on the internet or do i have to do nothing, can i read a book?
>
> I want to ask why do we look at the sun at that specific time, the sun is the highest about noon time.
>
> Has this fixed your histamine issues ladies? its an awful lot to do if it doesnt help.
>
> Thanks x

The frequencies of the sun vary from sunrise to sunset, at sunrise the "recipe" switch on the pituitary hormones, a bit later the frequencies including UVA turn them back off again. Back to the orchestra, the varying frequencies crescendo up to noon, and then decrescendo throughout the afternoon, and then there is natural darkness. The intensity of the frequencies is like a volume switch, so in winter the volume is different to the summer ..... And your brain uses the information from the transitions, together with the day length, to set the circadian cycle, and respond to seasonal cycles (Hormones naturally fluctuate with the seasons). If you only get natural sunlight at noon, your brain is missing the early morning cues. Technology has too much blue, without the balance of red in natural sunlight (bad for eyes at any time ), and if you use bright lights, technology or tv without blocking the blue after sunset, you are telling your brain its noon, which keeps melatonin switched off .... and you need melatonin to get good sleep and enter the regeneration pathways at night ....

Eating after sunset upsets the circadian rhythm, particularly for the gut ... its working when it should be quiet, its releasing light etc, which the brain takes note off. I try to eat by 6 in summer when sunset is at around 9 (British summer time), but in winter 7-8 is a definite mismatch. I got round it by eating a large breakfast, a moderate lunch, and only having a snack (such as a bowl of bone broth) at around 4 if I need it. If I've eaten enough earlier in the day I'm fine, and sometimes ditch the 4 pm snack, but it might take a bit of time to get to that point.

Theoretically if you open a window and look towards the sun, you could get the frequencies to the eyes, but grounding helps to connect to the changing magnetic field of the earth, and grounding reduces inflammation in the body. Its a 1 plus one equals 3 synergy. Its also free.  In the UK with the lower light levels generally, I think grounding is even more critical, because although I can set my circadian rhythm, I can't "harvest" light photons on my body in the same way, and grounding (and CT) is a way to offset that. You can ground on grass, soil or slabs (provided the slabs don't have an artificial membrane underneath sometimes used to stop weeds coming up between the slabs). If there's been snow or the grass is icy I've used a genuine chamois leather to stand on, an animal skin, or IIRC you could use wool or cotton socks, provided they are 100% wool or cotton. I've just got back from 4 days in Amsterdam (low light levels, high EMFs) where I couldn't ground, and when I got home my muscles were screaming with inflammation and pain, and I felt like shite ....  back home at midnight I crawled into bed to total darkness with an outside grounded grounding yoga mat under my feet while I slept, and when I got up at sunrise my muscle pain was 95% improved .... During the day, grounding outside getting the natural light transitions is a critical part of my routine, without it I doubt anything else I do would be as effective.

I've got a pendant, (not qlink) having seen live blood microscopy images, but I don't rely on it, or assume it makes me safe ..... The images were for one mobile phone, not for the millions of sources I was surrounded by in Amsterdam for instance ...... I knew I was heading into a difficult EMF situation (my daughter is studying there), but I assessed the risks, I did what I could in advance and while I was there, and went into recovery mode as soon as I got back .... A pendant aint a patch on what Mother Nature can do ....

### sam2018 — 2018-01-05T17:39:36+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/leaky-gut-and-histamine-issues.20641/post-231683>

If it rains the night before and the floor is wet, is that ok to stand on? and how long shall i stand there - i felt like a freak with a blanket around me and barefoot just staring at the direction of the sun (theere was no sun) because my neighbours can see me. Is 15 mins after sunrise ok? also i got a bit ill when i came in and was very tired and sleepy all of a sudden. I think it was due to the pollution / haze and chemtrails they spray everynight.

### Queen of Elves — 2018-01-05T20:53:41+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/leaky-gut-and-histamine-issues.20641/post-231709>

> [Sue-UK said:](/goto/post?id=231562)
>
> Hi Sam
> I'm in the UK too, and with the lack of good sunshine optimising my sleep is a top priority. No food or screens after sunset, dim lighting and eye protection, and - because sleep is when we regenerate, cold dark and boring bedroom. Although its not just about quantity of sleep, but about quality, at this time of year I aim for a minimum of 5 nights a week with at least 10 hours total darkness, with no wifi interference from anything I have control over. I use blackout curtains but a cheap start off if you don't have them is to use black wheelie bin liners stuck up with blue tack (I take liners and blue tack with me when I travel). I wake up naturally before the sunrise now, (but if I didn't I would set an alarm), I get out at sunrise and get my bare feet on the ground and (no glasses or contacts) look in the direction of the rising sun. Even if I can't see the sun, there is enough photons of light from the sunrise to set the circadian rhythm in my brain. The brain circadian rhythm is like a conductor in an orchestra - it needs to be working right in order for the organ "instruments" to play on time. Any "instrument" can be out of tune or its own circadian "clocks" out of rhythm, so we might all have different issues, but I think getting the conductor in control of the whole orchestra is the same for everyone. For me it didn't happen immediately, but when I understood the importance of it, it was easier being consistent, and it has paid dividends.
>
> Welcome to the forum.

Sue, same late sunrises here in Germany. You say you wake up before sunrise, do you wear blueblockers until sunrise? Are you having breakfast before or after sunrise?

Welcome to the forum, Sam! Wet is good = more conductivity

### Sue-UK — 2018-01-06T11:10:26+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/leaky-gut-and-histamine-issues.20641/post-231761>

> [Queen of Elves said:](/goto/post?id=231709)
>
> Sue, same late sunrises here in Germany. You say you wake up before sunrise, do you wear blueblockers until sunrise? Are you having breakfast before or after sunrise?

No, because I'm rural and don't have street lights or anything from the neighbours, any outside light is natural. The bedroom is blacked out but once I get out to the hall there's natural light through the semi and fully glazed doors at each end of the corridor (bungalow), and non bedroom rooms have the curtains and blinds left open. From first light or if there is enough moonlight, I can move around the house safely without putting any lights on. I rarely put on inside lights during daylight, but I'm lucky in that I don't have to get up early to go to work, I can fit my (now almost retired) work in when I want. If I have to get up in the dark and turn on lights (like when I had an early flight to Amsterdam), I can use my own blockers, which I made from clear plastic safety glasses and gel filters. I have some that I hope are closer to the -6 solar elevation, and -3 elevation frequencies. In the evening I use them in -3 to -6 order, then going to darkness. In the morning I can use them -6 and then -3 going to natural light (but they are not safe to use for driving).

I never eat before sunrise, I'm trying to keep my eating window between +6 degrees solar elevation in the morning, and +6 late afternoon. With sunset so early, the late afternoon end of the window is trickier, but the morning one is easier.

### Jack Kruse — 2018-02-28T22:35:27+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/leaky-gut-and-histamine-issues.20641/post-235982>

Leaky gut is an allergy to electromagnetic fields. Histamine is an electromagnetic compound linked to voltage gated channels and calcium second messengers which also work electromagnetically.

If you have this in a 4G world your in for a big problem in a 5G world. You have to hack the electric and magnetic fields in your environments. Not just home......everywhere you go.

Histamine comes from the aromatic amino acid histadine. Histidine decarboxylase (HDC) is an enzyme responsible for catalyzing the decarboxylation of histidine to form histamine. In mammals, histamine is an important biogenic amine with regulatory roles in neurotransmission, gastric acid secretion and immune response in many tissues but histadine is incredibly important on the skin where sunlight interacts with it. People forget that all aromatic amino acids have benzene rings acts like photon traps for UV light that slows light down for specific reasons. Bacteria are also capable of converting histadine to histamine and a non infectious form of food born illness occurs in spoiled foods, especially from old seafood. Fermented foods, like natto, cheese, wine, and kombucha have natural levels of histamine present in them to cause many of their effects from the bacteria and yeasts ability to change histadine to histamine. Most histamine is found in mast cells , basophils, and eosinophils which are cells found in the barrier tissues and the circulatory system. This shows you that they all interact with surface light frequencies. In the brain histamine can act as a neurotranmitter and in the skin histidine acts as a sunscreen protector. Another key place histamine is stored is in the gut in the enterochromaffin system of the stomach. Histamine cause many food allergies or sensitivities because it is released when the environment is filled with nnEMF. This is due to alterations of the calcium control mechanisms that work normally with light. RF radiation is associated with large surface currents and this can usupr the control of the process controlled by sunlight. People often forget that sunlight is natural calcium channel blocker and this acts to control the release of histamine in many tissues exposed to sunlight. It also points out why non native frequancy of light cause signaling issues. nnEMF is tied to food sensitivities, gut symptoms, and bacterial/yeast production of histamine to great excess. Most people do not realize how these things connect to modern illness like eczema, allergy, and food intolerances. Eliminating the food is not the wise decision but mitigating your environment is the key move of the mitochondriac. Histamine, is just another biogenic amine is affected by solar light........ is also tied to the increase in volume of the connective tissue stroma in the skin to make some unique chemical in the skin like filiggrin...........anything that gets larger in the universe is a sign of electron loss and electron loss = less light assimilation photoelectrically. ### Meli — 2018-01-08T23:28:16+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/sleeping-in-a-van.20645/post-231998>

If you have a hands free system in your van make sure that the blue tooth is off. You do that from the van/car end. If you have phones paired to your system even if the phones are off or phone blue tooth is off, the system is looking for the phones and that equals a 2.4 gigahertz signal - like having wifi on all the time the van is on.
I finally figured this out yesterday and unpaired all the phones off my system.

### Jack Kruse — 2018-01-08T23:41:55+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/sleeping-in-a-van.20645/post-232001>

Hands free is as bad a in home alarm and fire alarm system...........nobody even thinks about them.

### Sunny Cowgirl — 2018-01-09T03:02:04+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/sleeping-in-a-van.20645/post-232039>

I've been seriously looking into getting a caravan. I'm planning on parking it in a area of my property that gets zero phone reception. Will need to be super careful about power source. Fridge and stove can be run on gas. DC Lighting can be run off the batteries. Be careful about where solar system components are located though as some vans have inverters under the bed!!!!! I'm not intending using an inverter in the van and I'll have the solar panels located away from the van as I won't be on the move with it.

I think it's do-able with extreme caution not to use electronics inside the van. Sit outside with feet on the ground!

**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/sleeping-in-a-van.20645/post-232056>

# Thread: Hello From the YYJ (Vancouver Island)

### Fausty — 2018-01-05T00:53:17+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/hello-from-the-yyj-vancouver-island.20646/post-231635>

Hey everyone! So I found myself here after reading Jacks book which was a result of listening to a podcast by Jack. He talked about using red light therapy instead of MMJ. I've been a chronic smoker for 10ish years (with intermittent breaks randomly of 6 mos to a year) after an accident I had when I was 16.

Post-accident, dragged myself back to peak athletic potential before randomly having osteo issues that put a stop to my athletics almost in one night. Since than I've tried just about everything from MMJ, athletic workouts, bulletproof diet, Wim Hof method, supplementation, juicing etc. I've basically tried to fix my issues through meditation, food and athletics which has helped but the issue remains!

Doing some of Jacks techniques have helped me get off MMJ, but definitely feel the imbalance in my body as a result of years of use.

Here's my protocol:
Morning grounding at sunrise
Oats + Chia as I've been told I've had issues w/ sulfur
Work the ole 9-5
Some form of movement after work (Functional Patterns has helped with my "non structural scoliosis" but it always comes back when I have to travel for work or take a couple weeks off from the gym
Meditate
Video Games or TV with blue light glasses
Sleep 6-8 hrs

Will be adding CT next. Really interested in this red light therapy so if anyone knows what I'm talking about it would be greatly appreciated!

Working on:
Moving somewhere other than an island that rains constantly
Mito Diet

what are you eating? drinking?

Have you heard of movnat? Erwin Lecorre

Google Jeremy Thomley - he has an incredible story to tell.

If you can manage it - become a Gold member and you will have access to Jack's monthly webinars and the follow up live Q&A when you can ask Jack anything.

Have you seen Jack's 2 Vermont talks? ....really important to see these.

Did you see the youtube event with Jack and Jermy? a lot of great info about C/T etc.

**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/hello-from-the-yyj-vancouver-island.20646/post-231881>

# Thread: Sorry to ask

**Subforum:** Beginners Area
**Posts:** 5
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### shannoncorrin — 2018-01-05T18:12:49+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/sorry-to-ask.20653/post-231692>

I’ve searched this and I’m having a really hard time figuring out something very basic. Please don’t blast me for asking this: what time is “morning sun”. I get up at 6am every morning. Sun doesn’t rise here until after 8. Do I have to be out there right when it rises? Do I have some time to get out there. Sorry for the basic question

### Sue-UK — 2018-01-06T13:53:12+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/sorry-to-ask.20653/post-231772>

Sunrise for me at the moment is also after 8. At 6 a.m. it is still astronomical twilight, moving to nautical twilight nearer to 7, and civil twilight at around 7.35, with sunrise at around 8.15. If I wake up before sunrise, I still get outside to see any pre-sunrise transitions at that time, and if I come indoors before sunrise I don't use any artificial light, its just the frequencies that come through the windows. UV isn't about anyway so isn't being blocked by the windows, and I'm getting the visible frequencies that are occurring naturally, which I think helps keep circadian rhythm. The astronomical to nautical to civil to sunrise is a crescendo, whereas at sunset its a reversing, decrescendo into night. I think the brain registers it, so I don't want to be messing with artificial lights if I can avoid it. I get out a few minutes before sunrise so that the pituitary is ready to get the 0 degrees solar elevation frequencies at the right time. I don't know what the goldilocks zone is for getting out a bit later and still counting it as sunrise, but I would suspect it has more to do with degrees of solar elevation than "time" after sunrise. From pics I've seen, the dominant frequency can change with a plus or minus 3 solar elevation, so for me its better to be a bit early than a bit late for sunrise.

### shiran — 2018-01-06T14:51:26+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/sorry-to-ask.20653/post-231775>

> [shannoncorrin said:](/goto/post?id=231692)
>
> I’ve searched this and I’m having a really hard time figuring out something very basic. Please don’t blast me for asking this: what time is “morning sun”. I get up at 6am every morning. Sun doesn’t rise here until after 8. Do I have to be out there right when it rises? Do I have some time to get out there. Sorry for the basic question

It depends what's your schedule and how much time you have...
It's an n=1 story , the AM sun is usually not strong so you can spend the time from sunrise till around 10 just enjoying life.... if you have a schedule I would say anything is better than nothing spend as much time as you can in the AM sun 6-10 (-+) depends on location good luck
Don't be sorry to ask , be curious

### Jack Kruse — 2018-01-06T16:48:34+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/sorry-to-ask.20653/post-231790>

# Thread: Peripheral Neuropathy and loss of all sexual sensations overnight! Please Help!
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/peripheral-neuropathy-and-loss-of-all-sexual-sensations-overnight-please-help.20654/>
**Subforum:** Female Quantum Biology
**Posts:** 49
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### JessicaK — 2018-01-05T21:35:16+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/peripheral-neuropathy-and-loss-of-all-sexual-sensations-overnight-please-help.20654/post-231717>

I don't know if this belongs in this forum subject, But I need help.

I am 34 and I had never been sick or seen a Dr in my life. No drugs, alcohol or cigarettes. No sex before marriage.

Very clean living.

I got Botox 3 months ago, which is the only change I’ve ever made and everything changed overnight.

I lost my appetite, lost weight, became depressed, anxious, scared, foggy, disconnected, lost weight, lost my boobs within a week, my full cheeks are now hollow. My feet and hands are numb. My arms, ears and face, feel like there’s icy hot all over it.

And the worst part for me is the inability to be aroused. Literally overnight, any pleasure sensations were paralyzed. My nipples, which were always extremely sensitive and would instantly turn me on. My clitoris is numb and my vagina won’t open. I went to the gynecologist when I first realized it, she said it was patent and suspected vaginsmus. But how does that happen overnight? She was able to get her finger and then speculum in but couldn't open it. She said it looked normal and healthy though.

And when my husband tried, he could not penetrate and it felt like knives! I purchased some dilators and am working with those. My poor husband thinks I stopped loving him! But even simple pleasures like when he plays with my hair or tickles my arm are now sensation less. No more goosebumps. Foot rubs are painful instead of heavenly.

The dilators seemed to be working and my husband was actually able to penetrate me after 2 months, even though it's still pleasureless and hurts so bad.
So I went to the gynecologist again so she could do a pap smear and rule out infection. Before anything she said it looked dry, irritated, and atrophied! This time it took her about 20 minutes to get the speculum in, last time it slipped right in. It hurt so bad I could have sworn it was a steak knife. Through tears and screams I told her not to stop.

I’m heartbroken! I would take all the other side effects if I could just be intimate with my husband again.

If I had to diagnose myself, I would say I have peripheral neurophathy.

I went from happy, pretty, healthy, and in love to being terrified!

There are many botox support communities that I have found, that all have my symptoms for worse. I’ve only encountered a few people who have healed. But it took years. There are others who are still suffering and it’s been 8 years! And they all have the same story. Perfectly healthy and then life turned upside down over night after botox. And they’ve all been to countless Dr’s who can’t find anything.

I’ve seen an OBGYN, Family practitioner of internal medicine, neurologist, immunologist, and of course phelobotomist and have had over 40 labs of all sorts, and 4 MRI’s (brain, spine, lumbar, thoracic), and nerve testing of my hands, arms, feet, legs, and brain, which all resulted in nothing.

I’ve got an upcoming appointment with an endocrinologist.

While I am happy that I don’t have an auto immune disease or tumor, I am so scared that I will never be the same.

I believe the botox paralyzed my pleasure center. I used to be so full of life. Nothing else has changed. It was literally overnight.

Have you seen this before?

Right now I am on supplements of activated charcoal, chlorella, multi vitamins, magnesium, ACH, Citoline, echinacea, Burbur- Pinella.
I’ve read a few people had success with these. I’m eating high protein, no sugar or carbs.

Any recommendations of who I should see next or what labs to request? From things I've seen so far on the peripheral nueropathy blog, I will ask them to check my iodine and copper.
I would appreciate any suggestions!

"Good morning Jack. My MS client was feeling much better after a couple months on an autoimmune Paleo diet, exercise with me, & supplements suggested from your articles. She was gaining strength, energy, and a positive attitude. Although, she had a Botox treatment about 6 weeks ago in her legs &, since then, has been losing steam. She is back to work as a school teacher, part time, but uses her scooter much more and is more fatigued. I looked into the Botox and found itin locks acetylcholine, in turn inhibiting contractions. [Reply](https://www.jackkruse.com/why-leaky-guts-lead-to-ms/#comment-42699)

-   Jack says:
    [September 7, 2012 at 6:33 am](https://www.jackkruse.com/why-leaky-guts-lead-to-ms/#comment-42704)
    @Sheryl I am no fan of paralyzing muscles in the face of a disease that cause myelin loss. To me it makes very little sense.

    [Reply](https://www.jackkruse.com/why-leaky-guts-lead-to-ms/#comment-42704)

I also found this:
[https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC2856357/](https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC2856357/)
Botulinum toxin, one of the most poisonous biological substances known, is a neurotoxin produced by the bacterium _Clostridium botulinum_. _C. botulinum_ elaborates eight antigenically distinguishable exotoxins (A, B, C1, C2, D, E, F and G). All serotypes interfere with neural transmission by blocking the release of acetylcholine, the principal neurotransmitter at the neuromuscular junction, causing muscle paralysis. The weakness induced by injection with botulinum toxin A usually lasts about three months. Botulinum toxins now play a very significant role in the management of a wide variety of medical conditions, especially strabismus and focal dystonias, hemifacial spasm, and various spastic movement disorders, headaches, hypersalivation, hyperhidrosis, and some chronic conditions that respond only partially to medical treatment. The list of possible new indications is rapidly expanding. The cosmetological applications include correction of lines, creases and wrinkling all over the face, chin, neck, and chest to dermatological applications such as hyperhidrosis. Injections with botulinum toxin are generally well tolerated and side effects are few. A precise knowledge and understanding of the functional anatomy of the mimetic muscles is absolutely necessary to correctly use botulinum toxins in clinical practice.

and this:
**Central Nervous System Toxicity After Botulinum Neurotoxin Injection**
[https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC3821148/](https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC3821148/)

### JessicaK — 2018-01-07T00:35:17+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/peripheral-neuropathy-and-loss-of-all-sexual-sensations-overnight-please-help.20654/post-231841>

Wow! You all have a great understanding of the body. I am trying so hard to read as much as I can. I spend most of the time looking up the definitions for every other word or abbreviations as of now.
Yes I read multiple case studies on Botox which is where I got the supplements list to take. The biggest frustration is that all the doctors don't believe it's the botox and think I'm crazy. I've uploaded it below.

To answer a few questions before I spend hours reading and understanding all of your comments:

I have never had any health concerns. I've never taken medication, antibiotics, or even tylenol.
My dad is a chiropractor so I was raised very holistically. Just a good multi vitamin.

The only pill I ever took was accutane. That was about 5 years ago. But I took it for 6 months in very small dosages and never had side effects while I was on it, besides my lips being a little dry. Nothing that aquafor didn't take care of immediately.

I had 500 units of botox in my forehead and around my eyes for lines.
It was my third time in 10 years. Never any issues before. Stupid I know. I just didn't think it could be dangerous if all these celebrities did it and I hadn't heard any bad side effects besides ptosis. I should have researched first!

The only thing different I did this time was take a zinc lozenge from Zycam for a few days afterward because I got a runny nose. I think that was a bad idea. I read somewhere that zinc binds with botox.

I found this article too-

This one talks about cleaving to SNAP-25:
[http://www.jneurosci.org/content/jneuro/28/14/3689.full.pdf](http://www.jneurosci.org/content/jneuro/28/14/3689.full.pdf)

@[Penny](https://forum.jackkruse.com/members/446/) WOW!!!! Those are a lot of suggestions and I can't wait to look into them all! And yes I saw those articles about Botox as well. I feel so stupid for putting something so dangerous into my body. Thanks for posting those links.
I posted the case study I found as well. I literally have every symptom that she notes. And that's why I started to take Alpha GPC and Citoline CDP Chline (hoping to produce for ACh.

@[JessicaK](https://forum.jackkruse.com/members/20929/)

DDW -- Deuterium Depleted Water

It is a technical term that can be applied to all waters other than one, the Standard Water.
So it is meaningless when applied to any water unless amount of contained D, deuterium is specified at the same time.

When one searches for a most deuterium depleted water and at the same time worries about cost,
RO, Reverse Osmosis Water beats hands down all other waters, and at the same time it is usually the cheapest water available anywhere.
That includes all fancy waters, glacial, from cenote waters, icelandic waters, Voss, Pellegrine, Pland spring and any other naturally occurring waters which includes water from water wells on someones backyard.

There may be variations between this or that RO water, but those are variations within category.
Officially tested RO water by CignatureHealth is Aquafina made by Pepsi.
Aquafina have 139.5ppm, that corresponds to δ2H (VSMOW)=(-104.34)

### JanSz — 2018-01-08T17:27:48+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/peripheral-neuropathy-and-loss-of-all-sexual-sensations-overnight-please-help.20654/post-231954>

> [WalterNL said:](/goto/post?id=231951)
>
> Well they have independent testing done. You can contact the third parties and request to see their results. For Qlarivia it's a German laboratory, don't have the name at hand.
>
>
> Yes that checks out. We can be sure 55ppm is man made DDW.

How much RO water to add to 25ppm DDW to get 55ppm?

Assume RO is 140ppm
To get one unit of volume of 55ppm water we need to take
x volume of 25ppm
and
y volume of 140ppm
x+y=1
x=1-y
25x + 140y=55
y=30/115=0.26087
x=0.73913

Qlarivia comes in 1/2 L bottles

add 0.5\*30/115=0.130435 Liters RO to one bottle of Qlarivia
or mix
**4 bottles of Qlarivia with one 1/2 L RO water (=2.5 Liters) (about day's supply in my case)**
that will give
(2\*25+0.5\*140)/2.5=**48.000 ppm mix**

# Thread: decrease brightness- increase flicker???
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/decrease-brightness-increase-flicker.20656/>
**Subforum:** Beginners Area
**Posts:** 8
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### taiyang — 2018-01-06T14:23:23+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/decrease-brightness-increase-flicker.20656/post-231773>

i was listening to a podcast with dr. wunsch and ben greenfield in which they were saying that when you use apps that decrease brightness, you actually increase flicker ("But it sounds to me (Ben)like what you’re (dr. wunsch) saying is that some of these LED-based light bulbs, as well as some of the monitors, etc. that you can decrease brightness on, what you’re doing is decreasing the brightness and you’re increasing the flickering..."), which is harmful. is anyone familiar with this? if it is true, it makes more sense for me to disable f.lux and just look at a super bright screen with skin surfaces covered and uvex on. do you agree?

### Inger — 2018-01-06T16:47:46+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/decrease-brightness-increase-flicker.20656/post-231789>

No not exactly

F.lux will not change or increase flickering afaik, but if you turn down the screen brighntess, that will increase flickering.
So you could use f.lux on darkest, and not turn the screen brightness down, and the use blueblockers

Or, you could get Iris blueblocking program on your computer, because I have read, it is designed in a way that even if you decrease screen brightness, the flickering does not increase.

I am not decreasing my screen brightness anymore. I used to, but stopped as I learned about the flickering issue. So I just use Iris on the darkest setting "sleep", it filters all blue and green. Or if I need to see more I just use "health", but only when sun is up. After sun is down and it gets dark I additionally use my blueblockers, and i try to get off my computer at least a few hours before bed. Ideally at 6 PM but sometimes I do stay a bit longer on it.  which is not ideal tho.

When I used f.lux I used it on the darkes setting always, except when outside in sunshine because then I could not see anything

### Jack Kruse — 2018-01-06T16:50:36+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/decrease-brightness-increase-flicker.20656/post-231791>

Iris is an anti flicker program

### Jack Kruse — 2018-02-28T05:02:02+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/2018-mexico-members-event-mitohacking-lesson-5g-warning.20662/post-235914>

Why cold cenotes, strong tropical sun and calcium carbonate holes in the ground holding 65 million years of groundwater matter?
1\. Limestone filters water to deplete it of deuterium over time.
2\. The pH at room temperature is ~7 meaning there are about 10^-7 moles of H+ per liter of water at room temperature. As the temperature increases, the ability of water to ionize in this way increases and so the concentration of H+ in solution will increase and hence the pH will drop. This favors the formation of H+ bonds in an aqueous heat bath we call a cell. Just how big a deal is it when you are a true blue mitochondriac? In all cases, raising the temperature invokes thermal vibrational and entropic effects. This tends to preferentially stabilize H+ over D bonds. Mother Nature knew exactly what she was doing when she made our stolen bacteria at our core innovate uncoupling proteins and haplotype variations. The more heat you liberate the more deuterium you excrete and the faster ATP is made because the spin rate of the ATPase increases and the TCA cycle performs like a Ferrari and not a Nissan Sentra. [https://pubs.acs.org/doi/abs/10.1021/ja9530376](https://l.facebook.com/l.php?u=https%3A%2F%2Fpubs.acs.org%2Fdoi%2Fabs%2F10.1021%2Fja9530376&h=ATODH4ZjHD8MhbsPSVW1kT9KMhbb5hq4YbT_U9ci-QmAYa1e6mYH8gX5_QSrAgEQT5DMPhCpjUPlVyajhCLGSlPTQuNCFbyyJ8GTRoNFGd6zGD6w-D8q7wf8tIPdfp7SKjvD5h8)

^^^^^^that is why cold exposures eliminate Deuterium. Cold exposure on the skin causes mitochondria to uncouple more..........to release heat.

3\. Why does strong sunlight with UV/IR light do it without the need for uncoupling proteins? Is this why equatorial haplotypes have no need for UCP's? Yep. When the sun hits cell water what happens? The EZ begins. What does EZ stand for? Exclusion zone. What does it exclude? Protons. Anything bigger than a proton is locked out, so the EZ water becomes a quasicrystal of Hydrogen bonds to become a battery. What has double the atomic mass and radius of a proton? DEUTERIUM. How do we clear it so effectively? Deuterium has a magnetic moment which is double a protons. This means it is drawn to tissues with big mitochondrial clearance pathways: liver/gallbladder bile, enterocytes, and kidney. Any questions folks?

So why is Mexico the shit for a mitochondriac.....???? Is anyone feeling me now?

### Jack Kruse — 2018-02-28T05:07:57+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/2018-mexico-members-event-mitohacking-lesson-5g-warning.20662/post-235915>

So when you call Senor Cruz up.........this should be what your day is like.

The magnetic flux in the crater is massively stronger, and since all cenotes are inside the crater ........what does that mean for deuterium depletion in Mx compared to anywhere else?

yep..........you're waking up now........

Some latest information regarding rollout of 5G in USA:
[Source: https://techcrunch.com/2018/02/21/att-names-atlanta-dallas-and-waco-first-of-12-us-cities-to-get-5g-wireless/](https://techcrunch.com/2018/02/21/att-names-atlanta-dallas-and-waco-first-of-12-us-cities-to-get-5g-wireless/)
"AT&T wireless announced on Tuesday the first cities to get its 5G network. The carrier plans on installing 5G in 12 cities by the end of 2018, and on top of the list is Atlanta, Georgia and Dallas and Waco, Texas. The remaining cities will be announced at a later date."

Source: [https://techcrunch.com/2018/02/27/these-will-be-the-first-cities-getting-5g-from-sprint-and-t-mobile/](https://techcrunch.com/2018/02/27/these-will-be-the-first-cities-getting-5g-from-sprint-and-t-mobile/)
"Just last week, AT&T announced the first handful of cities where it’ll roll out its 5G network later this year. Today at Mobile World Congress, T-Mobile and Sprint did the same.

Sprint’s first 5G networks will go live in Chicago, Los Angeles, Dallas, Atlanta, Washington, DC and Houston.

T-Mobile will fire up 5G in New York, Los Angeles, Las Vegas and Dallas first, promising to have it up and running in 30 cities total by the end of the year."

It goes thru the roof.......Why? As atomic mass rises energy must fall because of the mathematics of E=mc^2. It is basic Physics and math. When you have Lyme/toxins/viruses/mold in your blood/gut/tissues you must leave that environment because the loss of energy = a loss of redox. nnEMF puts more deuterium in your matrix and makes the situation for redox even worse…….= a shit ton more inflammation because the D/H+ ratio RISES pushing mass higher and energy lower in the E = mc^2 equation.
Anytime mass rises, energy must drop in kind because of that simple math equation. Remember that equation is a UNIVERSAL LAW. It's not that hard to understand when you focus on what matters and not on what does not.
Today, healthcare and the public is loaded with so many talkers and not enough doers. This causes us to drowning in knowledge that does not matter, while starving of us of wisdom that can save us. After you decide to dig your head out of the sand, the paradigm fades to black.

**

US

Ericsson**
Seattle, Washington and Plano, Texas

**Verizon** Sacramento, California to lead a three- to five-city 5G rollout in the second half of this year

The pilot will be available to customers in Ann Arbor, Michigan; Atlanta; Bernardsville, New Jersey; Brockton, Massachusetts; Dallas; Denver; Houston; Miami; Sacramento; Seattle; and Washington, D.C

_**AT&T** 5G Evolution_
5G Evolution in 23 major metros;
Atlanta; Austin; Boston; Bridgeport, Connecticut; Buffalo, New York; Chicago; Fresno; Greenville, South Carolina; Hartford, Connecticut; Houston; Indianapolis; Los Angeles; Louisville; Memphis; Nashville; New Orleans; Oklahoma City; Pittsburgh; San Antonio; San Diego; San Francisco; Tulsa, Oklahoma and Sacramento, California offering immersive entertainment experiences like augmented and virtual reality while on the go.

Last year, we also launched pre-standards 5G fixed wireless trials in Austin, Texas; Waco, Texas; Kalamazoo, Michigan and South Bend, Indiana

Att & T is deploying LTE-M technology across our network in Mexico.

||They also completed the first LTE-M international data session between the U.S. and Mexico,the world's first international data session on LTE-M.

**Europe**

San Marino is set to become the first European country to have a super-fast fifth-generation (5G) mobile network under a deal struck by the tiny republic and Telecom Italia.

**Telia** Stockholm, Tallinn and Helsinki in 2018.

Hamburg

Turin

UK

>

>

>
>
