### John Schumacher — 2021-05-29T01:38:44+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/seans-optimal-journal.20757/post-299066>

> [Sean Waters said:](/goto/post?id=299019)
>
> **[https://www.nature.com/articles/nature08991](https://www.nature.com/articles/nature08991)**
>
> **Adiponectin and AdipoR1 regulate PGC-1α and mitochondria by Ca2+ and AMPK/SIRT1**
>
> Adiponectin is an anti-diabetic adipokine. Its receptors possess a seven-transmembrane topology with the amino terminus located intracellularly, which is the opposite of G-protein-coupled receptors. Here we provide evidence that **adiponectin induces extracellular Ca2+ influx by adiponectin receptor 1 (AdipoR1), which was necessary for subsequent activation of Ca2+/calmodulin-dependent protein kinase kinase β (CaMKKβ), AMPK and SIRT1, increased expression and decreased acetylation of peroxisome proliferator-activated receptor γ coactivator-1α (PGC-1α), and increased mitochondria in myocytes.** Moreover, muscle-specific disruption of AdipoR1 suppressed the adiponectin-mediated increase in intracellular Ca2+ concentration, and decreased the activation of CaMKK, AMPK and SIRT1 by adiponectin. Suppression of AdipoR1 also resulted in decreased PGC-1α expression and deacetylation, decreased mitochondrial content and enzymes, decreased oxidative type I myofibres, and decreased oxidative stress-detoxifying enzymes in skeletal muscle, which were associated with insulin resistance and decreased exercise endurance. Decreased levels of adiponectin and AdipoR1 in obesity may have causal roles in mitochondrial dysfunction and insulin resistance seen in diabetes.

May I add -> Adiponectin, a Therapeutic Target for Obesity, Diabetes, and Endothelial Dysfunction - [https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC5486142/](https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC5486142/)

Cold exposure increases adiponectin levels - [https://www.researchgate.net/publication/24217538\_Cold\_exposure\_increases\_adiponectin\_levels\_in\_men](https://www.researchgate.net/publication/24217538_Cold_exposure_increases_adiponectin_levels_in_men)

[https://www.fivejourneys.com/blog/how-to-increase-adiponectin-the-fat-burning-hormone/](https://www.fivejourneys.com/blog/how-to-increase-adiponectin-the-fat-burning-hormone/)

### Sean Waters — 2021-05-31T23:45:16+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/seans-optimal-journal.20757/post-299227>

Some updates

1\. Starting to restrict my Water intake when in the Sun... noticing that there's a Green zone between over-drinking and under-drinking. Over drinking just causes sweating and under drinking dehydrates for sure. But the Green zone seems to let me skin sear a little, get that burn, and I can feel the amino acids and chemicals being synthesised.... I always get this at the beach where the breeze restricts sweating, but by the pool i always sweat buckets (no breeze)... beach is always better

2\. Costa Rica is now 4 weeks away....

3\. Reducing my Work hours down to 4 days a week for June. Then again down to 14 days in July and Aug. Then down to 12 days (3 days/week) in September. Hoping to be retired fully by next March.

4\. Restricting time on Laptop down to 5 hours per day on work days. Solely to do my work and very quick check of Media. Noticing how addictive it is and how much I use it.

5\. Since cutting out all Toxins from my diet... Totally Organic/ Grass Fed Carnivore with Intermittent Fasting 23 / 1 .... i've started to notice the effects of the Screen on my Eyes........ I can feel the elongation and stretching of my Eye muscles every moment I'm using the screen.... I can literally feel the hypoxia occurring. I then notice how my PVN is clenching and stressed and so my lower Gut, sphincter and pelvic floor muscles are also tensed....... If I use it for too long I begin to feel a very mild adrenal fatigue.

**This is literally the etiology and route of my G.I issues, my Libido issues, my skin issues and my sleep and cognition issues.

Ubiquination series has never felt so real to me. I had to tear back all the veils and half-truths of the health paradigm to get here. Now, it's clearer than a Bank Holiday weekend sky in Mexico. DISEASE BEGINS IN THE EYE!**

I have ordered a pair of Clear Lens (40%) day blockers from Lucia Eyes as I lost my other pair. The problem is, I am working OUTSIDE! So, I don't want to block any light coming in... but as I am on my laptop, I'm not looking at the sun I am staring directly into artificial light. I can feel that I'm really hurting my eyes by not protecting my eyes in some form....... It's a frustrating conundrum.

I'm going to try it out with the Lucia Eyes and see if it's better. Even if I just keep the glasses at the end of my nose to allow the light over the top.

I'll stick with Sun. I'll stick with Fasting and I'll stick with Patience.

My path to minimalism and shedding (popular word right now) of my perceived needs/ wants/ desires that are blocking me from the Simplicity of nature is nearing it's end.

I'm dropping so much from my life, so many things and ideas I once thought I'd need. The same is occurring in my social life and my love life. The desire for simplicity and minimalism is overwhelming.

**_“The only thing we keep forever is what we give away.”_**

Neil Young sings in his song Comes a Time...

You and I we were captured
We took our souls
and we flew away
**_We were right
we were giving
That's how we kept
what we gave away._**

Simply, the more you give, the more you receive. Not necessarily from others, but also you receive a build-up in your soul, how you truly feel about yourself deep down, which is influenced, by the way, by how others feel about you.

So if we help others forever we help ourselves forever. Giving away our good energy maintains our good energy.

Your updates and journal are always inspiring... so glad you are doing well.

I like this

She ended up in hospital, very bad.. she is so thin. She is so health obsessed but in the wrong way, the supplement way.

### Sean Waters — 2021-06-10T00:07:51+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/seans-optimal-journal.20757/post-299536>

**From BTC #28........... [@Jack Kruse](https://forum.jackkruse.com/members/1031/) - I can feel the Love in this one.**

"Mistakes are opportunities for error correction. Error correction is a sign of intelligence rising. Decide to embrace today's fiat chaos.

A funny thing happens when you embrace the suck. A funny thing happens when you embrace your strengths or limitations – you become better able to embrace its opposite. This means you increasingly step into your true self and start to understand that failure is the best teacher.

See it as a gift: When you’re willing to accept your limitations, everyone around you breathes a bit easier. This is because when you accept your shortcomings, you create an environment of love and acceptance that helps helps everyone around you heal, themselves.

_Karma is a lifestyle that promotes positive thinking and actions._

Karma is not meant to be a punishment. It is present for the sake of education. How else is someone to learn how to be a good person if they are never taught that harmful action is wrong? A person only suffers if they have created the conditions for suffering. You control your own destiny with the decisions you make and act upon. "

### Sean Waters — 2021-06-25T18:46:09+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/seans-optimal-journal.20757/post-300252>

UPDATE

Ok so I am about 10 weeks into this Fasting (23/1) and strictly Grass Fed/ Organic Carnivore thing...

I've continued to get better and better and better. My sensitivity to Mold has vanished and my Rash is still completely gone except for when I do something that triggers it.

I even treated myself to 2 cups of Coffee over the weekend at the beach. But, I noticed my Rash was coming back almost immediately so I backed off.

More of the same regarding Libido and Sexual Performance - I'm feeling the best ever. Mentally I'm also doing amazing and I'm socialising more than ever, avoiding negative spirals - such as arguing on social media and getting into bullshit fights, and just being super aware and careful with where I spend my energy.

**However, in the 2 weeks, I've developed an inflamed Stomach.** Normally, it's my Small Bowel, but right now (and in the moment of writing) I have a swollen and throbbing and sometimes painful Stomach. It correlates with my Technology use, because I have started to take several days off my Laptop in one hit, and it disappears, as does the Sunburn I have on my nose, as well as the Eye Twitch I have at times.

It really began when I started to cut out the Coconut Oil from the Carnivore diet, because it's Plant based. I wonder if that was Lubricating my Stomach/ Gut, and now without it, I am eating so much Cooked Meat that it's too hard to digest. But, the problem is, if I eat Coconut Oil I also don't sleep good and feel Fatigued after my meals and low dopamine. Without it, some mornings I wake up and have Acidic / Reflux in my throat - because eating One Meal a Day I'm throwing down too much Meat.

So no matter which way I eat, or which way I "Carnivore" my life, I can't escape that in some tissue I will develop a problem due to technology. I have to re-iterate it really disappears when I avoid the Tech.

It's like, I've run out of Ammunition, and the Germans are approaching LOL... it's like a knowing that only way to get optimal from here is to really walk away from Tech.
**
I don't know how much more One can tweek/ twist/ edit and change their Diet to avoid the consequences of Blue Light and EMF. I've started to really understand, that there are no more bullets left, no more tricks left up the sleeve of this Bio-hacker. I either walk away from Technology, or accept the very consequences that it will give me Disease... literally, Dis-Ease.**

It's a bit like... You can run, but you can't hide.

I have to continue to work for the timebeing. But, I have a plan that reduces my days working down from 5 days per week down to 3 days per week in the next few weeks. I'm already down to 4 days, but it is still too much.

Before you ask, yes I work outside and get enormous amounts of Sun. There is a problem with the WiFi here too, there is too much. But, it's really the screen more than anything because on my days off it disappears and I'm still living here and sleeping here. It's just the Screen. I use IRIS Software too - but it isn't good enough.

I hope this is an eye opener for some people who think we can make Tech truly "safe". I really don't anymore...

Anyway, I go to Costa Rica next week and will be in a much much better environment, no 4G and hardly any people around, I'm positive that will make a big difference. 8 miles of beaches to explore and noone around. Lots more time in the ocean etc.

But, it's all worthless unless I uncouple myself from Technology for good. So, my goal for 2022 is to reduce my days on technology of any form to 1 day per month purely for finances/ catching up with friends and family. I've already reduced my time on my Smart phone to 15 mins, every 3 days, or 45 minutes per week to manage some things on there. So, I'm sure I will be able to do it with technology. The issue is my job, and my addiction to "Information"... this forum, the blogs, the social medias and communication... it's highly, highly addicitve, and so is the actual Light frequencies that are on the screens... so it's going to be difficult. But, Farming and Surfing and Outdoor speaking/ coaching is where I'm going to be divert my time too....
**
Life is too short, and when you're sick, it goes even faster.**

### Sean Waters — 2021-06-25T18:54:59+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/seans-optimal-journal.20757/post-300253>

The connection between the EYE and the GUT couldn't be any more real to me in this moment. I never really, truly got it, until this moment. I "heard it", and I thought I understood it, and I've spent the last 3 years kicking everyones ass about how important it is and how it's the sole reason for all disease.

Yet, I've still remained on Technology, and I've kept abusing my body with the frequencies of Light that harm me. The learning and experiencing of information are two very very different things, and it seems to me that there are actual Levels of understanding too - levels of experience that shift our perspective deeper and more boldly.

I realise that, there is no way for me to also convey that perspective to other people until they also "get it" via experience in their own time.

The bio-hacking family I have grown from this community and my very best friends don't "get it" either and still abuse technology and refuse to uncouple for the timebeing. I too, will continue to choose to abuse my body while I "get my finances sorted" so I can retire... this is an excuse, a trade-off, it could be a dangerous mistake.

Maybe the House isn't on fire enough for them or for me right now, or they still feel ok and can supplement/ thiamine their way around it. I think I can for the timebeing too.

But I will pass no judgement on them, because I am the same as them... an innocent foolish human... and so I will leave this here, for when anyone needs to read and find what they may be looking for.
**
Unfortunately, our own choices, afflicted by our Dopamine levels, are keeping us prey to our own predation.

Could you walk away from it all? All the communication, human contact and information at your fingertips? If you had to, could you walk with rage into the long goodnight?**

Great post!

I think for EHS individuals like myself we have to be wise when we do use technology. We need to listen to our bodies and unfortunately sometimes that’s a day, a week or a month off technology. I actually did a whole year when I was at my worst. Did it suck... yes! But just like the “fast” we do with food... it gets easier. It’s impossible to live in this world without technology. Even if you live in a tent in the woods this new satellite technology can now still affect us. It’s learning how to outsmart the algorithm.... being aware when technology is manipulating us... hurting us. Use technology in moderation and for things that better your soul and don’t let it steal your soul. And the soul can slip away slowly with this stuff- like a frog in water on a stove. They know this and are patient. God blessed us with free will... and he guides us when we keep that connection strong with him. With a strong connection all things are possible.... It can be Heaven on Earth or Hell on Earth but the choice is always ours.

Where everyone steals

Glycerin

Glycerin, glycerin
Glycerin, glycerin

Bad moon white again

### Sean Waters — 2021-06-30T18:53:14+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/seans-optimal-journal.20757/post-300526>

Leaving Mexico tomorrow without plans to return, for the first time in 1 year.

Very mixed emotions, and I'm going to miss some really key people that have completely changed my life.

So strange how you can only feel the sadness and joy all at once. When leaving behind a friendship, a place, a lover. Even though you know that it wasn't right and it was marred with pain and struggle, and that your physical body can't take it anymore, you still miss the good, and even miss the bad.

Isn't it so human, to fall in love with pain and struggle? Is there anything more human, than empathy for torment?

All you really care about, when the time comes, is that there is nothing left... no time left... not for pain or love... it's Gone... and you'd trade everything to get back one of the worst days, just to feel it again, just for it not to be gone, for it not to be over.

**Don't let the days go by, I could have been easier on you, but I couldn't change if I wanted to.**

> The issue is my job, and my addiction to "Information"... this forum, the blogs, the social medias and communication... it's highly, highly addicitve, and so is the actual Light frequencies that are on the screens..

This.

Have you read "The Shallows" by Nicholas Carr? It was written some years ago explaining how our brains are changing in response to "hyper-media". We don't deep think anymore - it's all shallow, hyper distracted thinking. This "addiction to information" is actually addiction to the next dopamine hit, caused by our current situation. Very detrimental. And I am absolutely convinced of the addiction to blue light also that you mention.

Your story and journal are very inspiring. Thanks for sharing mate.

### Aussie Chris — 2021-07-12T03:18:40+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/seans-optimal-journal.20757/post-301003>

Here's a couple of pages which have some powerful messages about the consequences of hypermedia (going online). And it was written in 2010 - things have gotten much worse since then!

Very few people in my family or friends are even able to read a book anymore. Junk news dopamine hits and social media have ruined our concentration abilities. It's very sad. I try to be an optimist in most things but I'm very worried for the new generations who know nothing except for electronic media. I feel blessed that computers only really made an entrance in my late teens (I'm 37). I at least had most of my conditioning years reading actual books and playing outside.

### Sean Waters — 2021-07-12T19:36:20+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/seans-optimal-journal.20757/post-301035>

Oh man - I really, really want this book. It seems as though as telling us that the Computer acts a mirror, and we actually are evolving into Computers ourselves. We are merging with the computers way of thinking, and making it our own.

I can actually feel these processes occurring while I am online right now... there are 10 tabs open, 1 email app with things to reply to, Telegram app with 5 chats of messages from different people, and the need for me to start my days work.... as usual, I don't do what I need to do, I fizz and bounce between all of the notifications until I'm burned out of dopamine and have no enthusiasm left to work.

This is all after spending 4 hours in the Pacific Ocean this morning downloading Costa Rican, 9th latitude, Sunlight while grounded to the earth and a bit of CT in a waterfall........

The thing is, awareness is one of the biggest weapons we have - we have the ability to recognise our own patterns of detriment. That's a blessing of our brain.

Another important point, we can walk away and reverse all of it back to normal by returning to those natural patterns, calm and linear, like how you think when you hike or climb a rockface, or read a story - **it's a choice we have to make though. I've already begun my walk away.**

Vegetables and Fruits are completely fake and nothing like what they were when they were Wild.

### Sean Waters — 2021-09-17T21:01:22+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/seans-optimal-journal.20757/post-303856>

[https://www.foodsystemprimer.org/food-production/history-of-agriculture/](https://www.foodsystemprimer.org/food-production/history-of-agriculture/)

Just look at the sheer amount of effort we have had to put in to make these foods possible.... No Banana, Peach, potato or any fruit/ veg of the modern day is anything resembling what is available in the wild.

It seems true in my own Bio-hacks, that if I eat these foods... even small amounts of Ginger and Turmeric seems to cause me some inflammation over the course of a week of consumption. Such species known to be "beneficial" to us, or therapeutic based on Ancestral Eastern medicine (when they would have looked, smelled and tasted and been prepared very differently to know).

**I think REDOX is the what allows us to make light work of this Deuterium**, if you want to Ice Bath and spend 5 years in the Tropical Sun to be able to eat these things then go ahead, but in the clinical case - I think it's critical that these are limited. Especially Fructans which are high in Deuterium,.... the old EPCOTx webinar's Onion, garlic recommendations don't apply in this modern 5G world. It's too much Deuterium for a population with too low Redox.

But I also believe that if these foods were REAL, as they were originally, in their much smaller versions of themselves, without the water weight and dilution and breeding of centuries and pesticides/ GMOs... do I think then that the benefit of Ginger would be great? that Turmeric could alleviate all inflammation?

I do. But not in the modern world, not as they are currently served to us. **It's another half-truth.**

### Sean Waters — 2021-09-18T21:04:00+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/seans-optimal-journal.20757/post-303909>

Having a day today where I wonder at the path I am choosing. The choices I am making. The discipline and restrictions I put on myself and my life, to avoid Inflammation and Disease.

Where I wonder if it's really worth the time I spend on it. Yeah, god forbid Big Brother catch me thinking this way (in reference to my own Ego).

Of course - without Health, what have you got?.... but without Emotion, Love and Inspiration - what have you got?

There are days when I feel much better than today, and on those days, I care less for these Emotions, for this thing called Love, and that of Inspiration.

However, the more decisions i make to protect myself against the plights of the environment, especially social isolation or being away from "them", the tech-using millenials, the more I feel lost and out of place. The more I'm not sure what I am doing. This confusion builds - and it will all come pouring out the minute you are feeling "off".

What am I doing here?... who do I hope to achieve?... can I ask those questions right now?... or should I merely be focused on building my life raft?... is this all just rumination due to over-priviledge?

What do I love? what do I want to do? who do I want to do all of it with?.... where is everyone that I love? who are they? why do I love them? why do they love me??

A great quote I read today from the 4th book in the Dune Series I'm reading (and addicted to), God Emperor of Dune, really struck a chord with my current state of mind. This is from the God Emperor himself, Leto, who has transformed into a Giant Half-Worm, half-human, that has sacrificed his own body to become a Worm that lives 3500 years in order to Save Humanity from itself and lead as a Tyrant that is hated, but is leading Humanity to a "greater good" although they don't know it. His time in power is called "Leto's Peace", but the Humans he rules hate him for it - everything has become Decadent and therefore: Boring.

Leto cannot indulge in the activities of a normal Man anymore. He knew this choice before he combined with the Sandworm, but he did it for humanity. After 3500 years he has come across a threat to him that he has never faced before.

He battles with the Human being created to destroy him - a creation of an evil race of Technocrats - **no, not a warrior or some super villain, but actually a beautiful and supremely honest, and extremely endearing girl named Hwi Noree**.

Leto cannot be destroyed by any physical means due to his Giant Worm body, and he is too smart for any plot or ploy, seeing all ends. But, his weakness being Love, as he remains half human - he realises she has been perfectly designed for him, and his human spirit is desperately clutching for what he cannot have - a physical relationship with this Hwi. He falls completely in love with Hwi almost instantly, with the evil race knowing this will destroy him and send him mad, and she too falls for him - knowing, but not caring, that she has been designed to do this to him. Also knowing, that they can never mate or engage in intimacy, they decide to get married to each other. Which, everyone around Leto thinks is a total disaster.

His majordomo, his 1st Minister and right hand man, Moneo, is furious and is desperately trying to convince his Emperor, his God, to not marry her as the entire Empire will laugh and mock them - at the fact that he is a Worm and she is a Human. Here is the extract:

_Moneo: "If I am to help you, you must tell me, why are you doing this?"

God Emperor: "Emotions. They have come over me just when I thought them gone forever. How sweet these last few sips of humanity are."

Moneo: "With Hwi? But surely you cannot..."

God Emperor: "Memories of emotions are not enough Moneo"

Moneo: "Are you telling me that you are indulging yourelf in a...."_

_God Emperor: "Indulgence? Certainly not! **But the Tripod upon which Eternity swings is composed of flesh and thought and emotion. I felt that I had been reduced to flesh and thought".**

Moneo: "She has worked some kind of witchery!"

God Emperor: "Of course she has. And how grateful I am for it. **If we deny the need for thought Moneo, as some do, we lose the powers of reflection; we cannot define what our senses report. If we deny the flesh, we unwheel the vehicle that bears us. But if we deny emotion, we lose touch with all our internal universe. It was emotions that I missed the most"**_

### Sean Waters — 2021-10-12T00:26:27+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/seans-optimal-journal.20757/post-304770>

I had a Tarot card reading just a few days ago.

I got the Sun as my 1st card, a card of Vitality and joy... followed by the High Priestess, a card that suggested I possess Psychic tendencies.

I got more cards through. One of them spoke of the need for forgiveness of my Father. It confused me a little at first. Later, another card appeared that showed I was worried about my Mother being bondaged with Material world, and not connecting to the spiritual wold, or God.

Another card revealed grief, or the passing of someone from my life. Usually associated with Death, but it's position reflected that this had been done with, this was now in the past.

[Depiction](https://www.google.com/search?bih=586&biw=1366&hl=en&sxsrf=AOaemvLp34zM8sbh6SY4_MbxCF5ijG5Xzg:1633986507223&q=the+sun+tarot+card+depiction&stick=H4sIAAAAAAAAAOPgE-LUz9U3MC0pzM7SkstOttLPLojPKdcvSSzKL4lPTixKsUpJLchMLsnMz1vEKlOSkapQXJqnAJZWAEkrwKUBGQQQEkwAAAA&sa=X&ved=2ahUKEwjw8NGKosPzAhWImWoFHdedBdcQ6BMoAHoECFAQAg): An infant rides a white horse under the anthropomorphized sun, with sunflowers in the background.

[Meaning](https://www.google.com/search?bih=586&biw=1366&hl=en&sxsrf=AOaemvLp34zM8sbh6SY4_MbxCF5ijG5Xzg:1633986507223&q=the+sun+tarot+card+meaning&stick=H4sIAAAAAAAAAOPgE-LUz9U3MC0pzM7SkslOttLPLojPKdcvSSzKL4lPTixKscpNTczLzEtfxCpVkpGqUFyapwCWVABJKkAlAXCEA8JIAAAA&sa=X&ved=2ahUKEwjw8NGKosPzAhWImWoFHdedBdcQ6BMoAHoECEsQAg): The card portends good fortune, happiness, joy and harmony. It represents the universe coming together and agreeing with your path and aiding forward movement into something greater.

[Upright card (keywords)](https://www.google.com/search?bih=586&biw=1366&hl=en&sxsrf=AOaemvLp34zM8sbh6SY4_MbxCF5ijG5Xzg:1633986507223&q=the+sun+tarot+card+upright+card+keywords&stick=H4sIAAAAAAAAAOPgE-LUz9U3MC0pzM7S0spOttLPLojPKdcvSSzKL4lPTixKsSotKMpMz4Bw4rNTK8vzi1KKF7FqlGSkKhSX5imAlSqAZBWgSiEcmFIA3F86O2QAAAA&sa=X&ved=2ahUKEwjw8NGKosPzAhWImWoFHdedBdcQ6BMoAHoECEoQAg): Enlightment, Joy, Marriage, Material happiness, Success, Vitality

[Reversed card (keywords)](https://www.google.com/search?bih=586&biw=1366&hl=en&sxsrf=AOaemvLp34zM8sbh6SY4_MbxCF5ijG5Xzg:1633986507223&q=the+sun+tarot+card+reversed+card+keywords&stick=H4sIAAAAAAAAAOPgE-LUz9U3MC0pzM7S0s5OttLPLojPKdcvSSzKL4lPTixKsSpKLUstKk5NAfPis1Mry_OLUooXsWqWZKQqFJfmKYDVKoBkFWBqITyYWgCAtT5GZgAAAA&sa=X&ved=2ahUKEwjw8NGKosPzAhWImWoFHdedBdcQ6BMoAHoECEcQAg): False impressions, Lack of clarity, Low Vitality, Sadness

[Element](https://www.google.com/search?bih=586&biw=1366&hl=en&sxsrf=AOaemvLp34zM8sbh6SY4_MbxCF5ijG5Xzg:1633986507223&q=the+sun+tarot+card+element&stick=H4sIAAAAAAAAAOPgE-LUz9U3MC0pzM7SkslOttLPLojPKdcvSSzKL4lPTixKsUrNSc1NzStZxCpVkpGqUFyapwCWVABJKkAlAQHvxKZIAAAA&sa=X&ved=2ahUKEwjw8NGKosPzAhWImWoFHdedBdcQ6BMoAHoECEgQAg): [Fire](https://www.google.com/search?bih=586&biw=1366&hl=en&sxsrf=AOaemvLp34zM8sbh6SY4_MbxCF5ijG5Xzg:1633986507223&q=Fire+\(classical+element\)&stick=H4sIAAAAAAAAAOPgE-LUz9U3MC0pzM5S4gAxDcvNDbRkspOt9LML4nPK9UsSi_JL4pMTi1KsUnNSc1PzShaxSrhlFqUqaCTnJBYXZyYn5ihAZTR3sDICAPHin05TAAAA&sa=X&ved=2ahUKEwjw8NGKosPzAhWImWoFHdedBdcQmxMoAXoECEgQAw)

[Ruling planet](https://www.google.com/search?bih=586&biw=1366&hl=en&sxsrf=AOaemvLp34zM8sbh6SY4_MbxCF5ijG5Xzg:1633986507223&q=the+sun+tarot+card+ruling+planet&stick=H4sIAAAAAAAAAOPgE-LUz9U3MC0pzM7SUspOttLPLojPKdcvSSzKL4lPTixKsSoqzcnMS48vyEnMSy1ZxKpQkpGqUFyapwBWogBSogBRogBRAgAPHdvxVAAAAA&sa=X&ved=2ahUKEwjw8NGKosPzAhWImWoFHdedBdcQ6BMoAHoECFMQAg): [Sun](https://www.google.com/search?bih=586&biw=1366&hl=en&sxsrf=AOaemvLp34zM8sbh6SY4_MbxCF5ijG5Xzg:1633986507223&q=Sun&stick=H4sIAAAAAAAAAOPgE-LUz9U3MC0pzM5S4gAxzXLjC7SUspOt9LML4nPK9UsSi_JL4pMTi1KsikpzMvPS4wtyEvNSSxaxMgeX5u1gZQQAPVakcUQAAAA&sa=X&ved=2ahUKEwjw8NGKosPzAhWImWoFHdedBdcQmxMoAXoECFMQAw)

[Depiction](https://www.google.com/search?sa=X&bih=586&biw=1366&hl=en&sxsrf=AOaemvJwOoS_h9TRHOYp0U79ndkaAYdkcg:1633986379159&q=the+high+priestess+depiction&stick=H4sIAAAAAAAAAOPgE-LQz9U3KMwxqNCSy0620s8uiM8p1y9JLMoviU9OLEqxSkktyEwuyczPW8QqU5KRqpCRmZ6hUFCUmVpcklpcrACXBgA65-44SwAAAA&ved=2ahUKEwjl6snNocPzAhWTkmoFHcHbCUgQ6BMoAHoECDoQAg): The High Priestess is identified with the Shekhinah, the female indwelling presence of the divine. She wears plain blue robes and sits with her hands in her lap. She has a lunar crescent at her feet, & wears "a horned diadem on her head, with a globe in the middle".

[Meaning](https://www.google.com/search?sa=X&bih=586&biw=1366&hl=en&sxsrf=AOaemvJwOoS_h9TRHOYp0U79ndkaAYdkcg:1633986379159&q=the+high+priestess+meaning&stick=H4sIAAAAAAAAAOPgE-LQz9U3KMwxqNCSyU620s8uiM8p1y9JLMoviU9OLEqxyk1NzMvMS1_EKlWSkaqQkZmeoVBQlJlaXJJaXKwAlQQAKSzvTUcAAAA&ved=2ahUKEwjl6snNocPzAhWTkmoFHcHbCUgQ6BMoAHoECDsQAg): High Priestess is a card of mystery, stillness and passivity. This card suggests that it is time to retreat and reflect upon the situation and trust your inner instincts to guide you through it. Things around you are not what they appear to be right now.

[Upright card (keywords)](https://www.google.com/search?sa=X&bih=586&biw=1366&hl=en&sxsrf=AOaemvJwOoS_h9TRHOYp0U79ndkaAYdkcg:1633986379159&q=the+high+priestess+upright+card+keywords&stick=H4sIAAAAAAAAAOPgE-LQz9U3KMwxqNDSyk620s8uiM8p1y9JLMoviU9OLEqxKi0oykzPgHDis1Mry_OLUooXsWqUZKQqZABlFIDyqcUlqcXFClClCiClCjClAEaOzw1jAAAA&ved=2ahUKEwjl6snNocPzAhWTkmoFHcHbCUgQ6BMoAHoECDkQAg): Hidden talents, Intuition, Mystery, Spiritual insight, Things yet to be revealed

[Reversed card (keywords)](https://www.google.com/search?sa=X&bih=586&biw=1366&hl=en&sxsrf=AOaemvJwOoS_h9TRHOYp0U79ndkaAYdkcg:1633986379159&q=the+high+priestess+reversed+card+keywords&stick=H4sIAAAAAAAAAOPgE-LQz9U3KMwxqNDSzk620s8uiM8p1y9JLMoviU9OLEqxKkotSy0qTk0B8-KzUyvL84tSihexapZkpCpkZKZnKBQUZaYWl6QWFyvA1CqA1CrA1AIAiYjd3WUAAAA&ved=2ahUKEwjl6snNocPzAhWTkmoFHcHbCUgQ6BMoAHoECDcQAg): Information withheld, Lack of personal harmony, Secrets

[Element](https://www.google.com/search?sa=X&bih=586&biw=1366&hl=en&sxsrf=AOaemvJwOoS_h9TRHOYp0U79ndkaAYdkcg:1633986379159&q=the+high+priestess+element&stick=H4sIAAAAAAAAAOPgE-LQz9U3KMwxqNCSyU620s8uiM8p1y9JLMoviU9OLEqxSs1JzU3NK1nEKlWSkaqQkZmeoVBQlJlaXJJaXKwAlQQAWEcoKUcAAAA&ved=2ahUKEwjl6snNocPzAhWTkmoFHcHbCUgQ6BMoAHoECDYQAg): [Water](https://www.google.com/search?sa=X&bih=586&biw=1366&hl=en&sxsrf=AOaemvJwOoS_h9TRHOYp0U79ndkaAYdkcg:1633986379159&q=Water+\(classical+element\)&stick=H4sIAAAAAAAAAOPgE-LQz9U3KMwxqFACswzLzQu1ZLKTrfSzC-JzyvVLEovyS-KTE4tSrFJzUnNT80oWsUqGJ5akFiloJOckFhdnJifmKEClNHewMgIA-mHlAVMAAAA&ved=2ahUKEwjl6snNocPzAhWTkmoFHcHbCUgQmxMoAXoECDYQAw)

[Ruling planet](https://www.google.com/search?sa=X&bih=586&biw=1366&hl=en&sxsrf=AOaemvJwOoS_h9TRHOYp0U79ndkaAYdkcg:1633986379159&q=the+high+priestess+ruling+planet&stick=H4sIAAAAAAAAAOPgE-LQz9U3KMwxqNBSyk620s8uiM8p1y9JLMoviU9OLEqxKirNycxLjy_IScxLLVnEqlCSkaqQkZmeoVBQlJlaXJJaXKwAUaIAUQIAGCZKOVMAAAA&ved=2ahUKEwjl6snNocPzAhWTkmoFHcHbCUgQ6BMoAHoECDQQAg): [Moon](https://www.google.com/search?sa=X&bih=586&biw=1366&hl=en&sxsrf=AOaemvJwOoS_h9TRHOYp0U79ndkaAYdkcg:1633986379159&q=Moon&stick=H4sIAAAAAAAAAOPgE-LQz9U3KMwxqFDi1U_XNzTMMM-oKilMytJSyk620s8uiM8p1y9JLMoviU9OLEqxKirNycxLjy_IScxLLVnEyuKbn5-3g5URAKXwPWZJAAAA&ved=2ahUKEwjl6snNocPzAhWTkmoFHcHbCUgQmxMoAXoECDQQAw)

\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*

My new neigbours who did this reading for me, the girl has the Sun Tarot card tatoo'd on her leg. In addition, the Sun card is XIX, or "19", which is 10. Anyone who has read my journal fully knows the affinity I have with that number. The High Priestess is II which is 2, but it is also closely depicted to 11 in it's written form.... 1 + 1, together. Those reading also know my affinity to that number. My house here, is #9. The other number that is closely associated with my journey.

The house in which I did the reading, my other neighbours, where we were all gathered - have 3 large white fabric prints of the Cards of the Sun and the Moon on their walls.

Some serious, heavy emphasis on this was being projected to me from the Universe itself.

I have spent a couple of days after the Tarot reading, dealing with some frustrating news that my ex-girlfriend has now taken the Vaccine. Out of weakness and submission to the needs of her life, that her tyrannical government has placed on her, she had to take it. To see her family in Sri Lanka, to make her work situation easier with travelling, with Airbnbs in Canada... she's taken it.

It knocked me sick with sadness. I tried not to let on too her how much it bothered me, but it did. It really, really fucking bothered me.

But, I wanted to know _**Why?... Why was I so bothered?... I haven't even seen her in 2 years nearly and we barely communicate anymore anyway. Still, the old feelings persist with her. But what are those feelings? Is it love? is it just old patterns trying to manifest itself?... Control, on my part?
**_
I spent all day thinking. Then I realised......... it goes back to my childhood. I still desire her, because she's so avoidant - just like my Mother was as a child, always at a distance. Why was she at a distance? Because she had to work, to please my step-dad, she couldn't be around me all the time. I needed that as a child.

Why did she need to do that?........ Because my Dad fell ill. He was completely off-the-rails by the time I was 1 year old. Why? Because of Blue Light and non native EMF......... always so frustrated with him as a child, at why he never could fix himself or raise himself out of his pit of despair.

As I grew older - I had to do it myself, when I also got struck with the same affliction of my environment. I also fell ill, and mightily depressed and eventually I figured it out. I fought my way out. Why couldn't my Dad do the same?

I wondered at what patterns my childhood is mirroring in my adult life......... chasing a distant, unavailable and slightly uninterested girl who says " I love you " in a different country?........... that's because my Mom was distant, that is LOVE as I know it best... as my Mother taught me. It's fucked up, and it must change, but it is true.

And my frustration, at her giving into the Vaccine, at not standing up for herself?.......... well, that is my Father being mirrored at me, because he also never did that. Is that why I also get so frustrated with people who don't "get it" with things that I understand? why I turn into such a Tyrant on the forum, or social media, when people do not try hard enough at healing themselves? or at fighting for themselves?... because those things all reflect my Father - and he let me down, which led to a very vulnerable position of survival - as I had to face my Stepdad as a child, which often means Death in the wild.... the fight or flight.......

Is this also why me and Jack Kruse\[/USER\] have bonded so deeply - why I share the exact same birthday as his own Father? That we have the common affliction, a share of disgust at our own paternal figures?

Is that why the Tarot card #3 was asking me to channel the High Priestess, the divine femine energy, to forgive him?

If I cannot forgive my own Father - for something that happened to him without his own understanding or ability to help himself - then how can I expect to ever let myself Live? how can I expect to let go off all these frustrations with humanity?

How am I ever going to live my daily life radiating LOVE and not HATE?

Will i forever be spending my time holding everyone to the high standards because I see my Father, and my own survival, in everyone I encounter? Will I ever be able to let go of this unsuitable and unavailable girl in a different country, and let her live her life, so I can find a suitable partner who I share a deep loving relationship that is long-lasting and rewarding and full of Vitality like that Sun Card shows...?

I have to Forgive. But, I actually have no idea how right now... back to my thoughts.

### Inger — 2021-10-12T19:32:10+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/seans-optimal-journal.20757/post-304785>

Maybe it is also like.. accepting. Accepting things that they are what they are. Things we cant change. I am learning this too. It is very painful and that is okay. But the more I learn to accept the less painful it is, in fact.

Somehow this is at least a big lesson for me.

I m now moving from here to Finland and it hurts like hell, honestly. I have build a beautiful life here. But something in my belly says, go. Go to Finland. Dont stay here. And i am listening to my belly. This country have gotten very ill. I feel so bad for all my friends here and they are so sad but I need to follow my inner calling.
My boss tried to talk me out of leaving today, as i told her i will leave. She thinks all we be good in spring and everything is already so much better, she feels very positive! But i feel it is only getting sicker. If you are not vaccinated here, you are now closed out of many things, or you have to test to enter many places and pay the test yourself. This is not normal by any means to me. It is very very sick. I cant even go to a cafe? Not that I need to but it is crazy!

I want to be near my family and in a country where is very little population. With way better options for me and people i love dearly. Sure my friends are dear but now i see how much my siblings matter to me too. And my parents. They see clearly this covid scam and do not take a vaccine either. They all just wait for me to come there. And my belly says yes.
But sure it hurts like hell anyways. I learn to just accept it. It is not going to kill me if it hurts a bit

### Sean Waters — 2021-10-12T20:22:13+0300

[@Inger](https://forum.jackkruse.com/members/1057/)

Yeah I think forgiveness and acceptance can be synonymous here, but with a really awareness of the subtle differences in the words...

if you have Forgiven, you are Accepting by default, yes.

But, I just need to be careful with my own Forgiveness of my Father that if I use the word Acceptance - it doesn't just become "tolerance"... I think there's a lot more Love in the word forgiveness. I think acceptance is saying "it is what it is". I think Forgiveness is truly saying "I love you no matter what you have done".

I think if God accepted our sins when we entered Heaven, it wouldn't be quite as loving as complete forgiveness.

You are extremely lucky to have a loving family awaiting you that truly does not believe in the tyranny that is occurring across the world... as I said before Inger, it sounds dreamy - go for it! Don't wait any longer!!

Caroline  things always change... and i go where the wind whispers  now it whispers to me, fly away from here..
It is freaking scary but I do it anyways. I cant ignore that voice in my belly.

I wanted to go to the tanning salon today, I have not been there since last winter. And now.. I could not enter!
I was not allowed to.
They needed a fresh negative corona test or vaccine.... Test cost me 15 euro, tanning salon cost me 10 euro. WTF.
This is very sick. I want stay in such a sick country. I dont care how good it all looks. The lady working there who I like so much, she dont believe in all this corona shit.. but she said, she had taken the vaccine now too.. because she had to.

And when you dont, you are locked outside everything except buying food
I can recall something from history in Germany, when similar things happened.....

Sending you some big hugs too... I know you know how it feels, living in a country that have turned tyrannical.
If I had family here, I might have just stayed, because I dont need their shit, I can just buy food thats it. But if I can live close to all my siblings and family these times, in a country with way better conditions and human rights, and way more wilderness and forest....I sure go there.

### Matt Fowler — 2022-02-04T21:58:34+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/seans-optimal-journal.20757/post-309554>

Hi Sean, I remember you mentioning Joe Dispenza meditations. How did you get on with those? Are you still doing them?

### Sean Waters — 2022-02-05T23:03:05+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/seans-optimal-journal.20757/post-309582>

> [Matt Fowler said:](/goto/post?id=309554)
>
> Hi Sean, I remember you mentioning Joe Dispenza meditations. How did you get on with those? Are you still doing them?

No I don't use Joe's stuff anymore, I had some success initially but I got distracted by a big dramatic relationship last Feb through til June and I thought to myself.... Well, if it did work, to manifest, then it pulled me in a load of F'ing drama. However, that could be seen as a positive in terms of growth and us needing to deal with our demons.

Also, I know several people who have had such strange experiences, notable a couple of Jack's members who were doing it and living in bad environments.

It got me thinking.

One was a girl living in California, LA. She was doing it a tonne and then had a bit of a transcendent experience while having an orgasm/ sex with a guy. The thing is, it was overwhelming for and she was quite traumatized by it. For months after she still wasn't right and felt not herself. She was reassuring me it was all good, but it really didn't come across like that to me.

I know many who have had enormous trance like euphoria from meditation and it doesn't do that ^.

Then I know another guy who was doing it and had a similar "high" and then developed some de-personalisation from it.

Got me thinking, what if doing these Hyper-ventilation / Breathing exercises in a high nnEMF environment leads to surges of certain things:

1.  DC current alterations in the CNS (increases, reversals of flow)

2.  Superoxide and/ or other ROS and RNS (due to large uptakes of O2 into neurons

If these are happening when Ca2+ (Calcium) is effluxed into the Cell, or perhaps when there is a lack of DHA (definitely in the girl as she hates seafood) in membranes, or if there is some existing issues at Cytochrome 1 where we generate ROS, then I think these breathing exercises could do some things we may not want.

The narrative of Dispenza and his followers is that you can "Overcome ALL". I believe that mindset is very healthy, and required for disease reversal, cause it is true IMO.

However, when the provided solution is Breathwork and effectively sucking up and trapping O2 into your Brain/ Head... it makes me think otherwise, unless the environment/ context is right.

Clearly, a lot of people have done his work and healed Cancer and other diseases... I don't doubt it, but I think some people need to be very careful.

About 4 months ago, after not doing any Meditation for about 4-5 months, I was introduced to a different practice by my friend and I was in a much better space and felt ready for it. It's called **Kriya Yoga.** There is no guide, no voice to follow, except some written instructions. You can also be initiated, which I plan to do this year.

It's been an incredible journey so far, I study it just as much as I practice it, and I always, **ALWAYS, focus on Redox first.**

I will say though, that the practice of Kriya has allowed me to develop a better connection to God than ever before. Through that, I've noticed that _**what I need (potential beneficial supplements, or dietary alterations, or something in my environment I need to cut out/ change) comes to me very rapidly and without trying, usually through suggestions from the people/ circle around me. Or, sometimes through spontaneous thought.**_

### EWO — 2022-02-06T06:17:28+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/seans-optimal-journal.20757/post-309591>

I had some really powerful experiences with Dr. Joe's work -- some of the most connected, loving, blissful states. But I also had a foundation of energy work first. I've felt troubled at times by a sense that Dr. Joe does not seem to offer caveats to his students. I've been initiated into a particular Kriya Yoga path, and my teacher(s) were very clear about the need to go step by step, to prepare onesself for the energy. Also, that you want to do that preparation before sharing profound intimacy with another person. These practices are deep and important and not to be taken lightly. As much as I love Dr. Joe's work and appreciate all I've felt in my body and heart and spirit as a result, it's missing that foundation. That said, our household loves his very first Blessings of the Energy Centers meditation, enough we listen almost every night. It is a foundational meditation (rooted in Fehmi's Open Focus technique) that helps a person gently and safely bring his or her energy centers into coherence (without any of the esoteric breath work that can lead to altered states of consciousness, and that might be dangerous if a person is not prepared and or under the close supervision of an experienced teacher).

### Sean Waters — 2022-02-08T17:24:50+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/seans-optimal-journal.20757/post-309746>

[@EWO](https://forum.jackkruse.com/members/25426/) ... Yeah I've had some great experience with some of his meditations too. I actually like his voice effects too, which many complain about.

You are dead right though, he's not teaching the complete practice which actually takes years of **Devotion** and patience, studying, learning from a guru and living your life in this way.

He's offerring some kind of bio-hackers shortcut to enlightenment and God, but we all know there are no shortcuts. I feel it's a similar thing as Ayahuasca and Peyote and DMT in that sense.

Yeah, believe it or not, the Kriya and Kundalini practices make you very, very magnetic (Jack has written extensively how Meditation acts like Cold, it increases Magnetism/ Mag Flux).

Oxygen is paramagnetic. Increasing that in unnatural amounts to certain areas can have a myriad of biological and spiritual effects, some not always wanted and not easily ridden.

It may be pulling things toward you that you aren't ready for.

So true about the intimacy aspect too, since I've practiced I've actually been celibate. I've not wanted to share myself with anyone except someone I have a deep Love for. It's not as though I haven't been tempted either, lord knows. But the idea of being with someone who isn't right for me is like the thought of smoking cigarettes.

I used to have casual sex and smoke a cigarette after... I love how things have changed.

### EWO — 2022-02-09T00:00:02+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/seans-optimal-journal.20757/post-309768>

I can totally relate.

This is not a story I tell often but it was through the practices that the guidance came to (through) me to become a mom (as a single person). I was inquiring about what it was for me to contribute creatively to the world, and there was a crystal clear moment of revelation that it was mine to be a parent.

I was single at the time and couldn't really imagine seeking out a relationship for the purposes of fulfilling that. I became a single by choice mom (of twins) about a year later. That it unfolded so effortlessly affirmed it was meant to be, in a cosmic sense. And every step along the way has felt like a fulfillment of mission and purpose.

And, the time is coming when it will be time to include a partner in my life again. It takes a leap of faith to remember that when it's time, it IS possible to attract/magnetize someone who is on spiritual path where intimacy and sex are sacred to both people.

One thing that helps is just remembering when I did my study and training there were plenty of good men and good women who were also on the path.

It also helps to hear your story of personal transformation--more evidence that it IS possible.

Thanks for sharing your story too, that's absolutely beautiful. I'm sure they're two very lucky children and that you will also find your partner when the time is right.

It's called **Kriya Yoga.** There is no guide, no voice to follow, except some written instructions. You can also be initiated, which I plan to do this year.
>
> It's been an incredible journey so far, I study it just as much as I practice it, and I always, **ALWAYS, focus on Redox first.**
>
> I will say though, that the practice of Kriya has allowed me to develop a better connection to God than ever before. Through that, I've noticed that _**what I need (potential beneficial supplements, or dietary alterations, or something in my environment I need to cut out/ change) comes to me very rapidly and without trying, usually through suggestions from the people/ circle around me. Or, sometimes through spontaneous thought.**_

Wow, so glad I asked you that question!!

I was intrigued by Dr Joe Dispenza at first, but the more I watched him the more I noticed his sales patter. I agree with you, I dont think people should be fucking around with their chakras without the necessary preliminaries. Pranayama, as far as I know, doesnt generally get taught to complete beginners, you have to do years of asana practice to get your subtle body ready for that kind of work. And I also agree re getting your redox up before trying anything like that. The yogis in India lived largely homeless, wandering lives where they were under high intensity sunlight and in contact with earth 24/7. Their mitochondria, and health in general, would have been far better that city dwellers in the 21st century - as im sure you will agree

But I am intrigued to find out more of dispenzas theory and mindset etc, but im deffo not parting with any cash to get it, he's rich enough.

Kriya yoga sounds interesting. Are you doing Sadhguru's version? I know Sri Sri Ravi Shankaar developed a method too (But Ive heard his organisation is all about the money too). Its still breathwork, no?

Im glad you're feeling closer to the absolute. Ive been looking into meditation/contemplative traditions for over a decade now, and what I can tell you is, everything modern society holds dear isnt worth a shit and is designed to separate us from our highest potential (the realisation of the interconnectedness of all beings and universal love). Kriya might be a good tool. One meditation I like is called the metta bhavana which translates as Loving Kindness/friendliness. Its one of the 4 Brahma Vihara meditations in Theravada Buddhism. Brahma Vihara means divine abode, or gods house.

Its also got some science backing it. The benefits seem to be quite far reaching, and its recommended as a cure for depression by buddhist monks.

[https://www.psychologytoday.com/gb/...backed-reasons-try-loving-kindness-meditation](https://www.psychologytoday.com/gb/blog/feeling-it/201409/18-science-backed-reasons-try-loving-kindness-meditation)

I follow the techniques that come from Lahiri Mahasaya. You need to be initiated, it's not something to practice without help from a guru.

I'd highly recommend reading the Autobiography of a Yogi before starting. Also, look up the Self-realization fellowship.

8.  Artificial vagal stimulation is possible with a vagal nerve stimulator, but there are no indications for use with cancer at this time. I have a sense this might change with time. Help us overcome depression and anxiety. Help us sleep better to regenerate the immune system to fight the cancer as nature has built within us. Raise levels of human growth hormone. It gives you more time to affect the environmental changes mentioned above. Affect our overall ability to live longer, healthier, and more energetic lives.
10.  Use of isolation tanks in heavy water with a combination of artificial UV and IR lights within the tub or its environment is a consideration. Humming and listening to running water in this state markedly stimulate several senses that the vagus nerve monitors. I have used some optical hacks with light via my eyes to augment these effects. **60 ug x 1 per day (1/17th of the above solution)**
\- taken Orally mixed with Spring Water
\- Achieved by using only 1 drop of the above 1mL solution (17 drops to a 1mL Pipette = 1mg / 17 = 58ug)

### Sean Waters — 2022-03-23T18:19:26+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/seans-optimal-journal.20757/post-311433>

After asking during meditation on the roof 3 days ago:

"Show me how to heal .. show me, whatever it is .. show me way to return to my full power.. i am surrendering to divine wisdom... Show me how"

I was quite fasted in the evening and felt very energetic and my girl was loving my silliness. It's always when I know I'm in a good state - when I'm loose... Laughing and joking.

We went to a store and i felt compelled to look at one shelf while we were paying. I saw a pack of KetoStix... The urinary strips for ketones.

I was shocked as I've seen them in a store here, i even checked the pharmacy 6 months ago and they had none. How were they in an organic health store?

I felt every molecule desire them in my body.

I wondered... Could this be what I am missing?

I tested and i was in a very small, but just about in a state of ketosis when i got home.

After dinner, I was out again.

I've been eating a Carnivore style diet lately, it's been good, and my health has been the best and most consistent its been in years. Since cutting Dirty electricity + mold, and applying more Vagus Nerve Rx = mediation and CT an water immersion (even if 80-90 F)... I've had immense success in all areas. Especially sleep... To the point where i have managed to do heavy exercise again... First time in 5 years, huge huge success.

I've also got the girl back in my life who i met in 2019, the 1s an 0s, the magical relationship that eluded me is now in full swing and we're finally together and it's the happiest I've ever been. I learned to let go of my ego... And now God has given me her as a reward, **as i can now be trusted to look after her and be in control of my emotions...**

BUT... I said to my girl a week ago, "I feel i have higher gears that I need to tap into"...

This higher gear is a dedicated consistent state of Ketosis. It's really mind blowing how consistent you have to be...BUT the massive amounts of UV light here make it so easy to get into Ketosis than anywhere else (100 Hertz fat burning in mitos = UV light)

But even so, my diet was really blocking me. I realized I've fallen into the pattern of **eating too much Meat and protein... To the point where I just run off gluconeogenesis...

When i say too much - it's like easily a Pound (400-500g) of Meat on a plate... Like 100-125g of protein. 30-40g is needed for protein metabolism... But the other 70-90g is all turned into glucose. This is how you can still be running on Glucose on a Carnivore diet.**

### Sean Waters — 2022-03-23T18:24:58+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/seans-optimal-journal.20757/post-311435>

So, I've actively cut back on the portions of Meat.

It's not that I felt bad . I just didn't feel the Boom...

So now I'm eating 200g of the meat with just 2 eggs for breakfast (hitting the leptin Rx minimum 50g protein) and then fasting through day until dinner where i eat a similar 50g meal.

OR eat lunch and dinner and split it 25/25g protein roughly.

I've noticed i feel way lighter after meals and have that Ketogenic feeling... That energy and lightness.

It's only day 4 but yesterday i felt my blood sugar drop i was so tired and i noticed Sea salt helped but i realised this had to happen to get into Ketosis proper.

Today i tested and I'm back into a small, light pink state of Ketosis. I feel **really, really, really fucking good.
**
I can't believe I've been missing this all this time.

I can feel how much UV light and power I have inside me but my mitochondria were just waiting for me to tap into it with some discipline and awareness.

Testing ketones is critical too, even a high fat zero carb meals puts you out ketosis for horus. It's **consistency that is KEY.

Will keep posting updated but I think i just found my 3rd, 4th and 5th gear. I'm incredibly motivated to write and create... My girlfriend can already sense a change.

I am also going to join a local gym with an ice bath for daily DEEP CT. Exercise is going to be a big part of the Rx too going forward.**

### Sean Waters — 2022-03-29T02:00:02+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/seans-optimal-journal.20757/post-311646>

[https://high-fat-nutrition.blogspot.com/2015/02/ketosis-and-protein.html](https://high-fat-nutrition.blogspot.com/2015/02/ketosis-and-protein.html)

After a week of attempting Ketosis and failing, I've realised the importance of limiting Protein.

This n=1 is specifically and especially relevant to my own situation, as not everyone seems to need to limit protein to be in Ketosis (check the comments of the above post from Hyperlipid - Jack Kruse is actually in the comments talking about the Archimedes Principle and Cold Thermogenesis, to which he unfortunately got ignored by the dogmatic food biochemists).

_I want to clarify that I'm not "falling into food dogma" again either, but I recognise it's an essential part of my protocol to "feel good", although it may not be that important in the actually regeneration of my Redox potential, especially in comparison to my Mexican Solar Yield & Magnetic field._

Back to Protein & Ketosis.... the actual recommended amount from the numerous sources on Ketosis (Jacob Wilson, Volek, Phinney and Hyperlipid) seem to be of the opinion that 1-1.5g per KG of Bodyweight, or Lean Bodyweight is more than sufficient, any less than 1g can lead to some issues, and 1.2 is the sweet spot, with 1.5 being the very upper limit before it becomes an issue for generating ketones.

But, that range is very dependent on mitochondria. I have a feeling from Jack's previous anecdotes of his own ability to remain Ketotic up at 150-200g Carbs per day could be due to heavy Cold Thermogenesis and Fat Burning... athletes.. Sherpas.. Wim Hof... all I'd imagine are in a deep ketosis regardless of Food.

For me however - with my Complex 1 that is slowly, very tortoise-like, coming back to life over the last 2-3 years (and oh Lord knows how I am grateful for it's little steps forward and the difference this has made) in this immense UV/ IR and Magnetism, and lack of Dirty Electricity/ EMF/ BL - I am finding that Protein is a really glucogenic - especially certain amino acids.

Note - some of these Amino Acids (like Tryptophan) can be programmed to be _**either Ketogenic or Glucogenic**_ in whether it forms FAD or NAD.. I'm still not sure how these are controlled but I imagine environment controls as Jack believes... possibly Nitric Oxide? hmmm
​

Anyway - there's a theme within the forums and blogs of all this Ketogenic debating and it seems that **older, less active folks or those with diseases (T2D) have to restrict protein MORE... I believe Jack would say this is due to UBIQUITINATION, something I wrote about a bit a few months ago. This is protein turnover and it is very costly to Mitochondria. Too much protein = more Ubiquitination and is a drain on Cellular ATP.**

**ATP = Protein unfolding = Water binding to Proteins to create Semiconduction and REDOX POWER... We're back to Redox again.**

**I also can see the simple biochemistry Peter points out on Hyperlipid - that Glucogenic Amino Acids would = Pyruvate and divert away from Ketogenesis. This would lead to more NADH and less FADH and as per his blogs, we want less of that, we want a higher ratio of FADH to ensure fat burning.**

It gives me another insight into the state of my mitochondria.... the cool thing is, I've been living off of easily 300g Protein per day as my main Macronutrient on a Carnivore style diet, and I've been doing OKAY... like really, better than in last 4 years.... which shows I've made improvment in my Pyruvate/ NADH/ Complex 1 problems.,... big improvements (Cutting dirty electricity has been huge for that!!)

But, this initial switch into Ketosis has been PROFOUND.... It's like another Gear... fucking hell it feels good.

Very excited for the future.

### Sean Waters — 2022-04-02T02:27:33+0300

Yes this is what i followed.... I initially did v well with it, when i was combining 23/1 fasting with it... But then after eating 2/3x per day my Redox potential plummeted.

Then i reintroduce Seafood only carnivore and did so much better. This was back in July - Sep 2021.

Sep - Nov 21 was lots of veggies, was v good, then drop in UV i had to change...

Dec 21 went keto with almonds/ macadamia an did well

Feb 22 the nuts weren't doing as good, so switch to Carnivore again with seafood though. ALL organic/ GF

March 22 i went back to Ketosis - this is where I am now...

Turns out, MUFAs from nuts/ avocado/ olive oil will drive up Hunger and Insulin Sensitivity (this is all Hyperlipid and David Speijer research) so they're good for a big "re feed" ... They're like how the Bears eat so much in Alaska to fatten up... The Fats become mostly NADH and so they make LESS ROS at Cytochrome 1... **Insulin is resisted when we make ROS (O2- an H2O2), so the lack of ROS = EAT MORE, FEED MORE...
**
I've noticed this sends my Estrogen up eating all these plant fats. My libido rises (Bear libido also in summer is ramped up) and also my irritability and reactivity (other males, competition, aggression).

The bears also eat a tonne of DHA/ omega 3 as the Salmon come up the rivers... We forget that fishing without Boats would be a seasonal affair too, and Oysters and Shrimp are also seasonal... We know from research that MUFAs are best with Omega 3 for absorption into the Brain an CNS... This will couple to stronger UV to provide a strong DC current for the animal as his/ her deuterium load and estrogen (D2O binding) rises in these months...

The gut flora will change also and will be responding to increase sulfation on skin and higher DC current and deuterium load... Effectively making animals shit their brains out (which is what we observe)

**_It makes me think Summer is a high DHA/ MUFA/ deuterium/ estrogen/ Sunlight situation and Winter is a high Saturated Fat/ lower DHA situation/ cold/ ketosis situation

This also makes sense on a smaller scale, think of our Day/ Night with metabolism... Jack suggests Saturated Fats and CCK stimulating fats at night, where sleep is a mini-winter, hibernation and cold and lack of DC current and food... Daytime/ morning is the summer, so eat carbs and DHA in the AM with MUFAs for optimal results (BAB)
_**

The reason is, MUFAs make less FADH an more NADH (Less ROS).

So, Saturated Fats like ghee and tallow (as per Anne's advice) are a **Winter signal.** They create a tonne of **_appropriate ROS from reverse Electron flow, by being more FADH an less NADH producing.
_**
This is why they satiate us very easily, as they Activate the ROS that shuts off Insulin Sensitivity, stopping us from allowing Fats an Glucose into the cell (Deuterium if you think deeper) and keep us **Satiated and easily, naturally Fasted and ketogenic,** they also are free of the Estrogen issues (provided they're good quality).

It's all back to Seasonality.

UV Light lowers Estrogen via photolysis. We also have Jack's comments in CT series that cold thermogenesis is actually easier with higher omega 6 in the tissue and glucose acts as antifreeze.

Is this for the first month or so while the animal deuterium depletes an becomes cold adapted again?

All very interesting.

I've gone back to Saturated fats (ghee) with seafood today. And the munchies i had all day yesterday from MUFAs has subsided... I managed to put away 5000 calories yesterday in nuts an avocado an olive oil...

Finding the right balance for my mitochondria is what I'm seeking right now.

THE LIVER FLUSH – UPDATED 2020
Here is the updated method, from Phil Escott & Jeremy Ayres (Dr Jeremy)
Liver flushing challenge... Long post alert...
Inspired by Andrew Scarborough's hay fever post, I thought it was time to open myself up to ridicule
by introducing the subject of liver flushing. When I was in tremendous agony with psoriatic arthritis,
this procedure gave me five days to a week off from inflammation, and became, sadly, the highlight
of my month. I have done 40-plus of them to date (very few recently since low carb – maybe one per
change of season since 2013 and only a couple on ZC), so I consider myself quite experienced in
them. However, I'm still not even sure that they do what they are actually supposed to do in regards
to cleaning the liver (a lot of people just say it's saponification from the Epsom salts and olive oil
making the "stones" that are expelled), but they do have a powerful effect. I got rid of fatty liver and
cysts on the liver during my time experimenting with this, and my girlfriend who is Tanzanian (black
skin is prone to keloid scarring), flattened out all her scars after about ten of them.
Okay, the originator of them, Andreas Moritz, died young at 58 years old not long ago, but I think
that was because of his adherence to veganism. In many other respects, he was quite the genius. For
full info, check out his book, "The Amazing Liver and Gallbladder Flush".
Drink apple juice, about two litres a day for six days, or better, to avoid the sugar overload, a few
tablespoonfuls of apple cider vinegar in water three times a day, or malic acid tabs/powder... You're
just going for the malic acid (which apples and cider vinegar contain) to soften the stones. During
this time, eat a light diet, not too much fat as this 'primes' the liver to store bile so it can fire more
out on the main flush day. (The only excuse ever for low fat eating, but these days, I ignore Andreas's
advice and still eat full carnivore but just fast for a day or two before the flush day).
• On the day of the flush, don't eat after 2pm.
• Mix four tablespoonfuls of food grade Epsom salts in a big jar/jug so you can split 800ml into
four 200ml glasses. Or just mix a tablespoonful into each 200ml glass – up to you, but it
dissolves better if you leave it to soak or mix with hot/warm water
• Take one glass at 6pm, then one at 8pm. This will open the bile ducts in the liver and
gallbladder, so now you have soft stones, and the ducts are open and ready for action
• Then mix half a glass of the best possible extra virgin olive oil (walnut oil can be used also)
best is expensive and sold in dark glass) with half a glass of squeezed lemon or grapefruit
juice, shake it up and drink it quickly at 10pm (this is one hour before the Chinese
Gallbladder time of 11-1pm), while standing next to your bed. This theoretically triggers the
liver and gallbladder to expel the bile, and with it the stones, through the open ducts, having
softened them with the malic acid The Appe juice is replaced by ACV for 6 days.

“Father, there is little to tell.” She spread her graceful hands in a deprecatory gesture. “My consciousness has never associated itself with this temporary body. Before I came on this earth, Father, ‘I was the same.’ As a little girl, ‘I was the same.’ I grew into womanhood, but still ‘I was the same.’ When the family in which I had been born made arrangements to have this body married, ‘I was the same… And, Father, in front of you now, ‘I am the same.’ Ever afterward, though the dance of creation
change around me in the hall of eternity, 'I shall be the same.'"
\-Paramahansa Yogananda quoting Anandamayi Ma, Autobiography of a Yogi, Chapter 45

A rather large update....

I found a Bacteria in my Gut that has been there for 6 years, perhaps my whole life (it makes sense).

It's called Clostridia. I'm not sure which one exactly, but it is not C. Difficile.

I took a test called the Organic Acids Test from Great Plains. I'm not sure why I did it, but I was recommended it by a friend as despite my efforts with Solar Redox in Mexico I was still struggling with sensitivity to Foods - to the point where I had to cut back and cut back right down to Carnivore.

Even Carnivore wasn't enough, it had to be Ketogenic and low protein. Then even still, the Rash and post-meal crashes would persist.

This has been going on for 5 years since London, way before I started my journal. **I had enough...
**
I decided to give the Functional Medicine folks a run for their money. Could it help? Could it indicate anything?

It seems as though this Drug Resistant Bacteria has been releasing HPHPA into my blood stream.

HPHPA has an ability to block the conversion of Dopamine Beta Hydroxylase into Adrenaline (Epinephrine).

It gives rise to a high HVA to VMA ratio (as seen on the first image).

This leads to **Excess Dopamine** and so this species and this clinical scenario is highly linked to Autism. That would also explain a lot - as I definitely feel the impulsivity and some of the issues they can face... especially if I raise my dopamine (Sun, CT, Coffee etc.) because I obviously cannot clear it!

I checked back to my Labs from 2016 with another naturopathic practitioner and found the same results in there:

This was before I moved to London...

I was in Ketosis but didn't feel great. **The HPHPA stops you from making Adrenaline... it makes you really low energy, Adrenal Fatigue basically as it ruins adrenaline.
**
This has been written about a lot by a guy called William Shaw:
[https://www.greatplainslaboratory.com/articles-1/tag/William+Shaw+PhD](https://www.greatplainslaboratory.com/articles-1/tag/William+Shaw+PhD)

He has also made a big connection to Glyphosate exposure and Clostridia species. As has Stephanie Seneff in her own work that runs parallel.
1\. [https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC5312745/](https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC5312745/)
2\. [https://www.scirp.org/journal/paperinformation.aspx?paperid=53106](https://www.scirp.org/journal/paperinformation.aspx?paperid=53106)

The 2nd paper there by Seneff made a link to **_Vitamin D3 Dysbiosis due to Glyphosate.... it's funny, because when I saw [@Jack Kruse](https://forum.jackkruse.com/members/1031/) in 2020 for a consult, despite Sunning myself in Mexico for 1 year... and having a 25 OH Vit D level of 99ng/dl in August... my Active Vitamin D3 1,25 Hydroxy (active form) was this.......... I WAS DEFICIENT!!

### Sean Waters — 2022-08-26T23:08:16+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/seans-optimal-journal.20757/post-315282>

**So what's the plan?**

1\. Intermittent Fasting 23/1 with Ketogenic Carnivore Template (Seafood once p/day)

-   for the first 4-6 weeks, then transition to:

2\. EPCOTx protocol with a Ketogenic template (Seafood once p/day)

-   Onions, Garlic, Turmeric, Sauerkraut, Kimchi, Kefir, Spices (Clove, Cinnamon, Blk Pepper, Ginger) and Herbs (rosemary, oregano etc.)
-   Add in Cacao (for Resveratrol) slowly over time

3\. (OBVIOUSLY) Tropical UV11+ Sunlight for >4 hours daily in **a low EMF environment (only 3G locally, Dirty elec mitigated)**

4\. Deglycyrrhizinated licorice (DGL 10:1)

5\. Wormwood (artemesia), Black walnut hull, clove extract

6\. Grapefruit seed extract

7\. Oregano Oil

8\. Colloidal Silver

9\. Vitamin C 1000mgs

10\. Diatomaceous Earth and Activated Charcoal

11\. Magnesium Cloride at night

12\. Avoid Coffee/ Caffeine, or alternate days on/ off

13\. Sodium Bicarb 3 x daily

14\. Curcumin (mega-dose) and Trans-Resveratrol (micronised)

15\. Apple Cider vinegar (as per Seneff recommendation)

16\. Only buy Organic Produce (as per Seneff recommendation)

17\. Turkey Tail Mushroom

18\. Saccarhomyces Bouldardi and "Culturelle" Lactobacillus Rhamnosus

19\. CoQ10

20\. Meditate, thank God for the opportunity and take it easy...... in 6 weeks I will re-test Organic Acids Test

### Sean Waters — 2022-08-27T23:53:49+0300

Had one of the best days I've had in about 7 years today. Absolutely insane amounts of Energy.... **especially when I was in the Sun: I felt like I could feel the charge running through my veins.**

I think the dysbiosis has been blocking conversion of 25 Hydroxy D into 1,25 Hydroxy D... essentially making me Vitamin D3 deficient in Mexico with a tan.

I felt supercharged today, that is all I can describe it as. I haven't felt that way since 2016...

One thing I've noticed is how **Ketones are higher even after eating more Protein and Carbs!!
**
I always knew the theory from Jack, that you could effectively fat-burn regardless of Macros... Jack mentioned once he was in Ketosis even after 200g of Carbs a day.

This absolutely flies in the face of ALL modern nutrition dogma and is not believed to be possible.

But, I notice when I'm going through "Die Off" or Dysbiosis from this Clostridia species, that I have to restrict carbs AND Fast for 23 hours AND keep protein below 1g/kg.... but, today as the Dysbiosis waned from my Protocol, I watched in absolute shock as I was in DEEPER KETOSIS than I was yesterday, and I've eaten 4500 calories last night... Nut Butter, Cacao, 750g Beef, 250g Pork, 4 eggs, Mushrooms and tonnes of butter (like 100g)

Then this morning I've eaten again 4 eggs and 200g Pork and mushrooms... and just 3 hours later I was STILL in a Small amount of Ketosis (pink on pee strip)

_**I feel like I've Fasted for 48 hours and yet I've eaten more than 2 days worth of Calories... I can only tell you and take pictures to prove I'm not lying.

FOOD DOES NOT MATTER WHEN YOUR REDOX IS HIGH......... ALL OF MY "TRIGGERS" ... Dairy, oxalates... None of them are affecting me right now.**_
**
Ketosis is maintained despite eating HUGE amounts of Protein (upwards of 300g in just 12 hours....)... this is enough Protein to produce around 150g of Glucose according to biochemical calculations (50/50 gluconergic/ ketogenic) from the likes of Paul Jaminet and Volek... some say Protein is actually 80% gluconergic or glucose-producing in simple terms... in that case, it would be like 250g of Carbs in 12 hours...

YET I AM STILL IN KETOSIS..........**

### ND Hauf — 2022-09-02T02:47:04+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/seans-optimal-journal.20757/post-315379>

For my cabbage/carrot mix.....

Pretty crude recipe but this is how we do it.

1\. I run cabbage/carrots through the food processor..... I'd call shredded....
2\. Juice some celery
3\. I crush the cabbage and carrots with my bare hands in a big mixing bowl until the juices are flowing
4\. I dump celery juice and favorite salt at the time over the top and continue to mix.
5\. I add a bit of juice from my previous batches as a starter.
6\. Smash it all down into a large jar as to not have any air and juice rises to top.
7\. I put a large cabbage leaf over the top then a lid on very loosely. Sometimes I just use a hand towel vs a lid. gasses need to escape for first few days. My grandma just used a crock.
8\. Leave on the counter for around 5-7 days. (Its good if you see bubbles)
9\. Test for consistency if I like it I put into the fridge with lid...IF it needs another day then it needs another day.

Some folks don't use a starter, but I've always used one and mixed them up throughout the years. A couple of my starters are from friends and family passed down for decades. I have no idea what kind of bugs are living in this stuff but it sure hits the spot and has never made me sick.

See below for some yogurt ideas.....

[My Health + My Wealth + My Civil Liberties + My Property Rights = My Freedom Journal | Page 33 | Jack Kruse Optimal Health Forum](https://forum.jackkruse.com/index.php?threads/my-health-my-wealth-my-civil-liberties-my-property-rights-my-freedom-journal.26760/page-33#post-312200)

[Aging is Not a Disease, Damn It! | Page 28 | Jack Kruse Optimal Health Forum](https://forum.jackkruse.com/index.php?threads/aging-is-not-a-disease-damn-it.25242/page-28#post-312165)

### Marko Pollo — 2022-09-02T04:39:58+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/seans-optimal-journal.20757/post-315381>

Great Recipes! We just got a case of honey from the bee keeper who puts a bunch of hives between sage and pasture, and my wife is harvesting garlic, so perfect. My favorite ferment is onions, but also love kraut and spicy peppers. I add a little apple cider vinegar to inoculate and maybe prevent a crazy yeast from taking over. Sean, sounds like it might help you to plant a garden. You will know for certain there is no chemicals, (imagine if organic farmer Joe has an outbreak of disease or petulance on his organic farm. Would he lose his crop and possibly his farm or maybe spray in the night and feed his family) the soil can be optimized for health of soil microbes, plants, and eaters of plants, your veggies can be grown for optimal nutritional value; not maximum sustainable yield, you can eat or harvest and ferment without washing, leaving the biology from the soil on the plants( I could be wrong, but I think the bacterial strains most suited for each plant is already there, so washing if there is no chemicals may be counter productive), eating live plants or animals should induce them to release light which should be adsorbed by you or your biome(according to me) , You ground in the sun while thanking nature for its bounty, you don't rely on anyone else to produce your food, and you build and maintain a relationship with your environment while making it better. Wow, long sentence. When I was younger, I tried gardening and thought it was a waste of time. I could fill my truck with bought veggies with a couple of hours work. Now I know the value I receive far exceeds my time and labor. I have no desire to grow veggies to feed the world as I would cheat my customers out of one of the greatest joys in my life. I know you are young, mobile and probably don't dream of settling down, but with your issues and the results you're having it might be beneficial. Good luck!

> **So what's the plan?**

>

> -   Add in Cacao (for Resveratrol) slowly over time
>

>

>

>

>
